title: Production Manager
description_excerpt: About RevolutPeople deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, w
_full_description: About RevolutPeople deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.About The RoleAt Revolut, Operations means problem-solving at scale. Our team tackles the company’s toughest challenges with speed, precision, and creativity. They design systems that unlock efficiency and power global growth.We’re looking for a Production Operations Manager to manage teams of up to 100 agents. You'll be collaborating closely with product teams, leveraging your people and project management experience, to continuously focus on optimising processes.Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.What You’ll Be DoingManaging a team of direct and indirect reports Exploring and defining which projects the team should prioritise, and setting a timeline to reach goals quicklyTaking responsibility for your team's development, guiding and working with them to unlock their full potentialLeading by example, resolving the toughest customer issues, and ensuring consistent high-level performance from the teamInteracting and collaborating with teams across the globe to constantly improve service levelsMaking critical business decisions by breaking down complex business cases and backing up reasoning using advanced analysisProposing, developing, and implementing systems, programmes, and processes to strengthen the foundation of exceptional customer serviceBuilding and optimising scalable processes to promote hyper-growthOwning business line metrics and improving people's performance, including decision-making quality and efficiencyEstablishing lasting relationships with vendors and partners to influence decisions for great deal-makingWhat You'll NeedAt least a 2:1 degree from a top universityExperience in engineering (graduates welcome to apply)Experience working in a structured, KPI-focused environment, such as a startupExperience managing large teams composed of direct and indirect reportsLeadership skills with a creative, confident, and motivational approachExcellent communication, interpersonal, and people management skillsThe ability to work in a fast-paced environment, managing multiple challenges simultaneouslyAn excellent problem-solving approach and demonstrated record of executing projects that measurably improved different metrics To be logical, analytical, and have experience resolving team productivity or quality issues in efficient waysThe ability to identify operational inefficiencies and provide practical solutionsThe ability to take a data-driven approach to identify root causes, measure performance, and drive process improvementsNice to haveExperience working with SQL, Python, and/or RCertifications in Lean Six SigmaBuilding a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.Important notice for candidates:Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment. Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

title: Senior Director of Product Management
department: Internet Marketplace Platforms, Technology, Information and Media, and Information Services
description_excerpt: Role OverviewWe are seeking a Senior Director of Marketing OS & Lead Generation Suite to own and scale one of the most critical product pillars. This leader will define the vision, strategy, and execution across our end-to-end lead generation and marketing operating system, ensuring our customers can attract, capture, nurture, and convert leads seamlessly.This role sits at the intersection of product, growth, and platform strategy, and will oversee a broad and highly integrated portfolio of tool
_full_description: Role OverviewWe are seeking a Senior Director of Marketing OS & Lead Generation Suite to own and scale one of the most critical product pillars. This leader will define the vision, strategy, and execution across our end-to-end lead generation and marketing operating system, ensuring our customers can attract, capture, nurture, and convert leads seamlessly.This role sits at the intersection of product, growth, and platform strategy, and will oversee a broad and highly integrated portfolio of tools that power the full customer acquisition lifecycle.Product ScopeYou will lead strategy and execution across a comprehensive suite of products, including:Lead Capture & Conversion: Funnels & Websites, Funnel AI, Forms, Surveys, Quizzes, QR Codes, Chat Widget, Countdown Timers, Funnel WidgetsTraffic & Acquisition: Digital Ads, SEO, AEO, GEO, Online Listings, Google Business Profile (GBP), Domains, URL RedirectsEngagement & Nurture: Email Marketing, Email AI, Social Planner, Blogs, Reputation Management, NotificationsGrowth & Monetization: Affiliate Manager, Loyalty & Referral ProgramsBrand & Content Systems: Template Library, Brand Boards, Media Storage, WebinarData, Analytics & Tracking: Dashboards, Reporting, Analytics, External TrackingEmerging Experiences: Vibe and next-gen AI-driven marketing workflowsKey Responsibilities1. Vision & StrategyDefine and own the long-term vision for organization’s Marketing OS and Lead Generation ecosystemIdentify opportunities to unify fragmented tools into a cohesive, AI-powered growth platformDrive product strategy that increases lead volume, conversion rates, and customer ROI2. Product LeadershipLead a group of product managers and cross-functional teams across multiple product linesEnsure tight integration across all surfaces to deliver a seamless user experiencePrioritize investments across a large surface area with clear ROI and customer impact3. Growth & MonetizationPartner with Growth, Sales, and Customer Success to drive:Adoption of core lead gen toolsExpansion revenue across the suiteMeasurable improvements in customer acquisition performanceDevelop packaging and positioning strategies for bundled and standalone offerings4. AI & Automation InnovationEmbed AI across the ecosystem (Email AI, Funnels AI, Vibe, etc.) to create autonomous marketing workflowsLead the transition from tools → intelligent systems that execute for the customer5. Platform & Ecosystem ThinkingEnsure all products operate as part of a unified Marketing OS, not standalone featuresDrive extensibility through APIs, integrations, and ecosystem partnershipsCollaborate with other platform leaders (CRM, Payments, Conversations, etc.)6. Data & Performance OwnershipEstablish and track core metrics:Lead generation volume & qualityConversion rates across funnelsCampaign performance (ads, email, SEO)Customer ROI and LTV impactBuild feedback loops using analytics and reporting to continuously optimize performance7. Cross-Functional LeadershipWork closely with Engineering, Design, Marketing, Sales, and SupportAlign stakeholders around roadmap priorities and platform directionAct as a key executive voice for this product pillar internally and externallyQualifications10+ years of experience in product management, growth, or marketing technologyProven track record leading large, complex product portfolios or platformsDeep expertise in lead generation, digital marketing, and conversion systemsExperience with tools such as:Funnels / landing pagesPaid ads platformsEmail marketing & automationSEO / local SEOStrong understanding of SMB and agency needs (preferred)Experience integrating or building AI-driven product experiencesDemonstrated ability to lead senior ICs and managers across multiple teamsHighly data-driven with strong business and monetization acumenWhy This Role MattersThis is one of the most strategic leadership roles at client. You will directly shape how millions of businesses acquire and grow customers, while defining the future of AI-powered marketing platforms.

title: Director Product Management
description_excerpt: At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future
_full_description: At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.Director – Product Management, Product KnowledgeBuild the Data-Powered, AI-Driven Future of Product DiscoveryAbout The RoleWe’re on a mission to redefine how people discover, explore, and connect with products online—and we need a visionary product leader to take us there.As Director of Product Management, you’ll lead the strategy and execution for our Product Knowledge and Catalog Platform—the intelligence layer that powers everything from search and recommendations to personalization and generative AI. You’ll shape how structured data, AI/ML, and LLMs come together to build scalable, magical, and deeply relevant customer experiences at massive scale.You’ll work at the heart of a high-performing, cross-functional team—collaborating with AI researchers, data scientists, and engineers to build the foundational data products that power discovery for millions of users.This is a rare opportunity to lead in a high-agency, startup-style environment with the resources and reach of a global platform.What You’ll OwnCatalog Intelligence at Scale Lead the development of robust, intelligent, and flexible catalog systems. Create automated, scalable ways to structure, enrich, and normalize product data across categories and geographies.Vision for Product Knowledge Define and own the product vision for taxonomy, ontology, metadata, and knowledge graphs that power our search and AI platforms.Build Magical Data Products Launch internal tools and APIs that feel like magic—powerful, intuitive, and built with scale and automation in mind. Make structured data work harder and smarter across all surfaces.Power Discovery Through AI & LLMs Partner with AI and data science teams to use LLMs, embeddings, and prompt engineering for entity resolution, classification, and content enrichment—fueling delightful discovery.Design for Relevance & Impact Focus relentlessly on customer experience—ensuring your products make search more relevant, recommendations smarter, and exploration more intuitive.Drive Product Excellence Define metrics, establish feedback loops, and iterate quickly. Marry technical depth with customer empathy to shape products that solve real problems beautifully.Collaborate to Deliver Partner across Product, Engineering, AI/ML, Trust, and Catalog Ops to launch products that are both deeply technical and profoundly user-centered.What We’re Looking For12+ years of product management experience, with 5+ years leading teams in platform, data, or AI-driven environmentsProven track record building structured data platforms, knowledge systems, or eCommerce catalog infrastructureStrong understanding of taxonomy, metadata strategy, and product classificationExperience working with AI/ML teams, including familiarity with LLMs and semantic search (a plus)A bias for scalable solutions—you know how to build for today and architect for tomorrowObsession with relevance, automation, and magic—you craft products that delight both internal and external usersStrong communicator with a track record of cross-functional leadership and influenceComfort working in fast-paced, iterative environments—you thrive in ambiguity and move with urgencyWhy You’ll Love This RoleBuild the backbone of product discovery for one of the world’s largest eCommerce platformsLead a portfolio that touches AI, structured data, and real-time customer experienceCreate scalable systems that drive magical user experiences at global scaleWork with world-class teams in AI/ML, data science, and engineeringEnjoy high ownership, fast execution, and a culture that values bold ideas and real impactPlease see the Talent Privacy Notice for information regarding how eBay handles your personal data collected when you use the eBay Careers website or apply for a job with eBay.eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.The eBay Jobs website uses cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to browse the site, you agree to our use of cookies. Visit our Privacy Center for more information.

title: Director -  Product Management (BNPL)
description_excerpt: PAYU PAYMENTS PRIVATE LIMITEDDirector - Product ManagementLocation – BangaloreAbout The RoleWe are looking for a strategic and innovative Director of Product Management to lead our product initiatives at PayU Finance. In this pivotal role, you will drive the vision, strategy, and execution of our product portfolio, ensuring that our offerings meet market needs and adhere to regulatory standards. You will lead a talented team of product managers and collaborate with cross-functional teams to deli
_full_description: PAYU PAYMENTS PRIVATE LIMITEDDirector - Product ManagementLocation – BangaloreAbout The RoleWe are looking for a strategic and innovative Director of Product Management to lead our product initiatives at PayU Finance. In this pivotal role, you will drive the vision, strategy, and execution of our product portfolio, ensuring that our offerings meet market needs and adhere to regulatory standards. You will lead a talented team of product managers and collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver exceptional financial technology solutions that enhance customer experiences and drive business growth.ResponsibilitiesStrategic Leadership: Develop and execute product strategies that align with business objectives, market demands, and customer feedback, ensuring a competitive edge in the fintech landscape. Team Development: Lead, mentor, and inspire a high-performing team of product managers, fostering a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement. Market Research & Analysis: Conduct comprehensive market research and competitive analysis to identify trends, opportunities, and customer pain points. Use insights to inform product development and positioning. Product Lifecycle Management: Oversee the entire product lifecycle from ideation to launch, ensuring timely delivery of high-quality products that meet user needs and regulatory requirements. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with engineering, design, marketing, compliance, and sales teams to ensure alignment on product goals and execution plans. Data-Driven Decision Making: Utilize analytics and key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success post-launch. Make informed decisions to iterate on products based on user feedback and performance metrics. Risk Management & Compliance: Ensure all products comply with legal standards and regulations. Collaborate with legal teams to mitigate risks associated with product development. RequirementsExperience: 12+ years of experience in product management within the fintech industry(BNPL Must Have), with a proven track record of successfully launching products at scale. Leadership Skills: Strong leadership experience with the ability to build, develop, and motivate a creative team while driving alignment across various functions. Technical Proficiency: Deep understanding of financial technology products, regulatory environments, user experience design principles, and agile methodologies. Analytical Mindset: Ability to analyze data effectively to drive product decisions and measure success. Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to articulate product vision and strategy clearly across all levels of the organization. What we offer?A positive, get-things-done workplace A dynamic, constantly evolving space (change is par for the course – important you are comfortable with this). An inclusive environment that ensures we listen to a diverse range of voices when making decisions. Ability to learn cutting edge concepts and innovation in an agile start-up environment with a global scale. Access to 5000+ training courses accessible anytime/anywhere to support your growth and development (Corporate with top learning partners like Harvard, Coursera, Udacity). About UsAt PayU, we are a global fintech investor and our vision is to build a world without financial borders where everyone can prosper. We give people in high growth markets the financial services and products they need to thrive. Our expertise in 18+ high-growth markets enables us to extend the reach of financial services. This drives everything we do, from investing in technology entrepreneurs to offering credit to underserved individuals, to helping merchants buy, sell, and operate online. Being part of Prosus, one of the largest technology investors in the world, gives us the presence and expertise to make a real impact. Find out more at www.payu.comOur Commitment to Building A Diverse and Inclusive WorkforceAs a global and multi-cultural organization with varied ethnicities thriving across locations, we realize that our responsibility towards fulfilling the D&I commitment is huge. Therefore, we continuously strive to create a diverse, inclusive, and safe environment, for all our people, communities, and customers. Our leaders are committed to create an inclusive work culture which enables transparency, flexibility, and unbiased attention to every PayUneer so they can succeed, irrespective of gender, color, or personal faith. An environment where every person feels they belong, that they are listened to, and where they are empowered to speak up. At PayU we have zero tolerance towards any form of prejudice whether a specific race, ethnicity, or of persons with disabilities, or the LGBTQ communities.

_full_description: About RevolutPeople deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. They turn complex problems into simple, scalable solutions — collaborating across Design, Engineering, and Data to build features our customers love.We're looking for a Head of Product to rethink our products and fraud systems to be AI-centric. You'll leverage AI for automation and enable intuitive, multi-modal customer interactions to build trust and streamline compliance processes.Up to shape what's next in finance? title: Director of Product Management
description_excerpt: Greenlight is the leading family fintech company on a mission to help parents raise financially smart kids. We proudly serve more than 6 million parents and kids with our award-winning banking app for families. With Greenlight, parents can automate allowance, manage chores, set flexible spend controls, and invest for their family’s future. Kids and teens learn to earn, save, spend wisely, and invest.At Greenlight, we believe every child should have the opportunity to become financially healthy a
_full_description: Greenlight is the leading family fintech company on a mission to help parents raise financially smart kids. We proudly serve more than 6 million parents and kids with our award-winning banking app for families. With Greenlight, parents can automate allowance, manage chores, set flexible spend controls, and invest for their family’s future. Kids and teens learn to earn, save, spend wisely, and invest.At Greenlight, we believe every child should have the opportunity to become financially healthy and happy. It’s no small task, and that’s why we leap out of bed every morning to come to work. Because creating a better, brighter future for the next generation depends on it.We are seeking a Director of Product Management to lead our India-based product management team responsible for foundational platform capabilities that power our financial services ecosystem. This is a highly strategic and technical leadership role that sits at the center of our architecture, enabling scale, compliance, and innovation across multiple products serving the U.S. consumer market. You will own and evolve a portfolio of mission-critical platforms that are reused across multiple product lines and directly impact customer experience, regulatory adherence, moneitzation, and operational efficiency.This role requires a strong technical product leader with deep platform experience, excellent systems thinking, and demonstrated success leading high-performing teams. In addition to directly managing a small team of product managers, you will also serve as the most senior product leader for the India site, helping elevate product craft, operating rigor, and cross-functional alignment.What you will be doing:Define and drive the long-term strategy and roadmap for core platform capabilities.Ensure platform services are scalable, secure, compliant, extensible, and reusable across the organization.Balance immediate product team needs with long-term architectural integrity.Identify and drive opportunities to leverage AI both in product execution as well as within platform capabilitiesProven experience owning and scaling complex, distributed systems.Experience in fintech, financial services, SaaS, or other regulated industries strongly preferred.Demonstrated success building reusable platforms used by multiple internal teams.Strong understanding of distributed systems, APIs, microservices, and event-driven architectures.Directly lead, mentor, and grow a team of platform product managers responsible for core Greenlight platformsStrong systems thinker with ability to see cross-domain dependencies.Exceptional stakeholder management across geographies.Experience operating in a US–India distributed team model.Ability to balance long-term platform health with short-term business demands.Act as a senior product leader for the India office, strengthening product operations, the product craft, and cross-functional collaboration with Engineering, Design, Data, Risk, Compliance, and Operations.Hands on experience and a deep understanding of the strengths and trade-offs of leading AI tools with demonstrated ability to build, deploy, and iterate on AI projects.What you should bring:10+ years of product management experience, with at least 5+ years in platform product management.3+ years of people management experience leading product managers.Proven experience owning and scaling complex, distributed systems.Experience in fintech, financial services, SaaS, or other regulated industries strongly preferred.Demonstrated success building reusable platforms used by multiple internal teams.Strong understanding of distributed systems, APIs, microservices, and event-driven architectures.Experience with identity systems, billing/subscription systems, or compliance platforms preferred.Ability to engage deeply with engineering on architecture decisions and trade-offs.Comfort with data models, system integrations, and platform scalability challenges.Hands on experience and a deep understanding of the strengths and trade-offs of leading AI tools with demonstrated ability to build, deploy, and iterate on AI projects.Exceptional stakeholder management across geographies.Experience operating in a US–India distributed team model.Domain Ownership:Identity & Access Management: authentication, authorization, RBAC/ABAC, SSO, multi-factor authentication, and fraud-resistant identity systems.Accounts Platform: user lifecycle management, account hierarchy, permissions, data governance.Pricing & Plans: flexible product configuration, entitlements, packaging, experimentation support.Billing Platform: subscription management, invoicing, payments integration, financial reconciliation, reporting.Notifications Platform: multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, push), templating, orchestration, and reliability.Risk & Compliance Systems: policy engines, rule frameworks, AI/ML models, monitoring, auditability, regulatory compliance controls.Why This Role Matters:Platform is the backbone of our product ecosystem. This leader will directly influence:How we scale new products and featuresHow we manage risk and regulatory complianceHow we monetize effectivelyHow we deliver secure, seamless customer experiencesThis is a high-impact leadership opportunity to shape the foundational architecture of a growing financial technology organization while building and leading a world-class product team in India.Education:Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical field required.MBA or advanced technical degree preferred but not required.Who we are:It takes a special team to aim for a never-been-done-before mission like ours. We’re looking for people who love working together because they know it makes us stronger, people who look to others and ask, “How can I help?” and then “How can we make this even better?” If you’re ready to roll up your sleeves and help create a world where every child grows up to be happy and healthy in money and life, apply to join our team.Greenlight is an equal opportunity employer and will not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on age, race, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition (including pregnancy, childbirth, or a medical condition related to pregnancy or childbirth), genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law.Greenlight is committed to an inclusive work environment and interview experience. If you require reasonable accommodations to participate in our hiring process, please reach out to your recruiter directly or accomodations@greenlight.me.

title: Sr. Director, Product Management
description_excerpt: Job SummaryNetApp is transforming how customers manage their data infrastructure through unified, AI-driven experiences. We're seeking an exceptional Senior Director of Product Management to lead our Bangalore-based manageability product team and drive the next generation of autonomous storage operations.In this role, you'll lead product strategy and execution for NetApp's manageability platform, including AI-powered autonomous operations capabilities, hybrid multi-cloud control plane, and SaaS
_full_description: Job SummaryNetApp is transforming how customers manage their data infrastructure through unified, AI-driven experiences. We're seeking an exceptional Senior Director of Product Management to lead our Bangalore-based manageability product team and drive the next generation of autonomous storage operations.In this role, you'll lead product strategy and execution for NetApp's manageability platform, including AI-powered autonomous operations capabilities, hybrid multi-cloud control plane, and SaaS platform services. This is a high-impact leadership role partnering closely with engineering, design, and go-to-market teams globally to deliver experiences that eliminate operational complexity and delight customersJob RequirementsProduct Strategy & ExecutionDefine and drive product strategy for NetApp's manageability platform, including AI-powered autonomous operations, hybrid multi-cloud control plane, and SaaS infrastructure.Lead a product management team in Bangalore, building strong talent and establishing best practices.Manage the complete product lifecycle for AI/ML platform services, hybrid multi-cloud capabilities, SaaS/SRE infrastructure, and trial/demo environments.Develop roadmaps that balance customer requirements, competitive dynamics, and business priorities.Platform DevelopmentBuild platform capabilities that enable AI-powered agents to work seamlessly across NetApp's portfolio.Deliver a hybrid multi-cloud control plane that manages NetApp infrastructure across on-premises, AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud environments.Ensure platform services (IAM, security, observability) are scalable, reliable, and easy to integrate. Customer & Market EngagementUnderstand customer workflows, pain points, and requirements through research, advisory boards, and direct engagement.Translate customer insights into differentiated product experiences.Work with sales teams to enable customer conversations and represent NetApp's vision at industry events.Team & OrganizationBuild and scale the product management organization in Bangalore.Establish effective collaboration across distributed, global teams.Partner with engineering leadership to maintain strong product-engineering alignment.Set standards for product management practices and execution. Required Qualifications15+ years of product management experience in enterprise software, SaaS, or infrastructure products.7+ years leading product management teams, including experience building and scaling teams.Proven track record of shipping successful enterprise products that customers love.Deep understanding of hybrid and multi-cloud architectures, SaaS platforms, and site reliability engineering principles.Experience with AI/ML technologies and agentic/autonomous systems.Strong technical acumen with ability to engage deeply with engineering teams on architecture and implementation.Demonstrated ability to drive cross-functional alignment in complex, matrixed organizations.Exceptional communication skills with ability to influence at all levels, including executive leadership.Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred. Preferred QualificationsExperience in storage, data management, or infrastructure management domains.Background in building platform services or developer platforms.Experience managing services across multiple cloud providers.Experience with observability, monitoring, and AIOps technologies.Track record of successful product launches in competitive markets.Experience managing global, distributed product teams.Understanding of enterprise sales processes and agile development methodologies. At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.Equal Opportunity EmployerNetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.Why You'll Thrive at NetAppAt NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.Our cultureWe celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Product Director – AI & Intelligent Workflows
description_excerpt: Vialto is a market leader in global mobility services. Our purpose is to Make global work better. We are unique and the only stand-alone global mobility business. This presents a rare opportunity for our clients, stakeholders, and colleagues.Our teams help companies streamline and effectively manage their global mobility programs in a cost-efficient and compliant manner. Our services focus on providing cross-border compliance and risk assessment for tax, immigration, business travel, rewards and
_full_description: Vialto is a market leader in global mobility services. Our purpose is to Make global work better. We are unique and the only stand-alone global mobility business. This presents a rare opportunity for our clients, stakeholders, and colleagues.Our teams help companies streamline and effectively manage their global mobility programs in a cost-efficient and compliant manner. Our services focus on providing cross-border compliance and risk assessment for tax, immigration, business travel, rewards and compensation, and remote work.Working at Vialto is about getting the chance to be part of a global and dynamic team. Globally, we have over 7,100 staff in 50 countries around the world and continues to grow. You will work with clients from a range of industries and different geographical locations. We believe in connecting the world and supporting our colleagues to do the same in their careers by undertaking assignments and opportunities globally that broaden their skills and ultimately benefit our clients.Vialto is unstoppable when we work together in a culture of belonging, where everyone can thrive. We encourage employees to bring their true selves and share their unique talents and expertise to positively impact the communities we serve. To learn more about what we do, tune in to our podcast On the Move to hear expert insights on issues affecting global mobility, and read about the latest news in the industry. You can also follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram.We are building the next generation of its global mobility platform, technology that processes over 500K tax cases, 250K visa applications, and 500K business travel assessments each year. This role sits at the center of enterprise workflow automation, applied AI, and large‑scale operational transformation. We are establishing a new product leadership hub in Bangalore, and this position will play a foundational role in shaping the product, team, culture, and AI‑driven capabilities of our platform. This is a high‑impact, 0-1 opportunity for a product leader passionate about complex workflows, AI‑enabled digital experiences, and building teams from the ground up.What You’ll OwnDefine product vision, strategy, and roadmap for a core domain within Vialto’s global mobility platform. Build and lead cross‑functional product pods (engineering, AI/ML, data, design) in Bangalore.Initial build: one pod of ~5 engineers Rapid expansion to a second pod Drive product discovery, experimentation, and prototyping using data insights, user research, and iterative development. Translate complex immigration, tax, and mobility workflows into intelligent, AI‑powered platform capabilities. Identify and embed opportunities for automation, LLM-driven enhancements, and intelligent workflows. Partner closely with global engineering and product leaders in the US and UK.  Influence the broader platform strategy as we transition to a unified Global Work Cloud architecture. Operate hands‑on early, hiring the team, shaping processes, and establishing a strong product culture.What Makes This Role UniqueHigh-volume, real-world impact: Your work shapes the tools used by thousands of employees globally. Platform in active transformation: Opportunities to re-architect, simplify, and modernize at scale.  AI-first charter: A mandate to integrate automation and intelligent decisioning into mission-critical workflows. Leadership visibility: This role sits on the VVN Bangalore leadership team and directly influences enterprise product direction. Greenfield team building: You’ll shape a new product capability in Bangalore from day one.Experience8–10+ years of product management experience, ideally in:Enterprise platforms Workflow automation toolsSaaS or internal systems Regulated or professional services environments Proven success defining strategy and shipping high‑impact digital products. Experience working with AI/ML, LLM-driven capabilities, intelligent workflows, and data-driven experimentation.Strong cross-functional leadership experience; engineering, AI, design, and data.Hands-on builder mindset; experience creating or scaling product teams from early stages.Operating in ambiguity, simplifying complexity, and driving clarity.Excellent communication and storytelling skills. Ability to influence global stakeholders across time zones. Strong problem‑solving instincts and domain learning agility.Tools & Technologies (Preferred)Experience with AI/LLM frameworks and workflow automation Familiarity with prototyping tools (e.g., Figma / Figma Make) Exposure to AI development frameworks (e.g., BMAD) Comfort working with modern engineering and data stacks Use of Copilot or similar productivity/AI toolsAdditional InformationLocation: Bangalore Employment Type: Full TimeWork Arrangement: Hybrid: 3–4 days per week onsite Travel: Occasional trips to the US/UK We are an equal opportunity employer that does not discriminate based on any legally protected status.Please note, AI is used as part of the application process.

title: Production Manager
description_excerpt: About RevolutPeople deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, w
_full_description: About RevolutPeople deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.About The RoleAt Revolut, Operations means problem-solving at scale. Our team tackles the company’s toughest challenges with speed, precision, and creativity. They design systems that unlock efficiency and power global growth.We’re looking for a Production Operations Manager to manage teams of up to 100 agents. You'll be collaborating closely with product teams, leveraging your people and project management experience, to continuously focus on optimising processes.Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.What You’ll Be DoingManaging a team of direct and indirect reports Exploring and defining which projects the team should prioritise, and setting a timeline to reach goals quicklyTaking responsibility for your team's development, guiding and working with them to unlock their full potentialLeading by example, resolving the toughest customer issues, and ensuring consistent high-level performance from the teamInteracting and collaborating with teams across the globe to constantly improve service levelsMaking critical business decisions by breaking down complex business cases and backing up reasoning using advanced analysisProposing, developing, and implementing systems, programmes, and processes to strengthen the foundation of exceptional customer serviceBuilding and optimising scalable processes to promote hyper-growthOwning business line metrics and improving people's performance, including decision-making quality and efficiencyEstablishing lasting relationships with vendors and partners to influence decisions for great deal-makingWhat You'll NeedAt least a 2:1 degree from a top universityExperience in engineering (graduates welcome to apply)Experience working in a structured, KPI-focused environment, such as a startupExperience managing large teams composed of direct and indirect reportsLeadership skills with a creative, confident, and motivational approachExcellent communication, interpersonal, and people management skillsThe ability to work in a fast-paced environment, managing multiple challenges simultaneouslyAn excellent problem-solving approach and demonstrated record of executing projects that measurably improved different metrics To be logical, analytical, and have experience resolving team productivity or quality issues in efficient waysThe ability to identify operational inefficiencies and provide practical solutionsThe ability to take a data-driven approach to identify root causes, measure performance, and drive process improvementsNice to haveExperience working with SQL, Python, and/or RCertifications in Lean Six SigmaBuilding a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.Important notice for candidates:Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment. Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

title: Product Director - Consumer
description_excerpt: Candescent is a forward-thinking technology company transforming how financial institutions deliver Intelligent Banking experiences. We unite digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions that power and connect digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions—creating seamless engagement across digital, remote, and in-person channels.Our Experience-Led, Intelligence-Driven approach combines human-centered design with data, automation, and cloud-based innovation. Built on an API-fi
_full_description: Candescent is a forward-thinking technology company transforming how financial institutions deliver Intelligent Banking experiences. We unite digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions that power and connect digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions—creating seamless engagement across digital, remote, and in-person channels.Our Experience-Led, Intelligence-Driven approach combines human-centered design with data, automation, and cloud-based innovation. Built on an API-first architecture, our extensible ecosystem enables institutions to adapt quickly, integrate easily, and unlock new opportunities for growth—turning every customer interaction into a moment of clarity, confidence, and connection.We are seeking a Product Director to define the strategy and vision for our Consumer Products. This role provides leadership while delivering cohesive, high-quality experiences that communicate value effectively.The Product Director owns prioritization and roadmap planning ,balancing platform changes, technical constraints, and business needs. This role drives alignment across engineering, product, and data teams, manages dependencies, and ensures demo strategy remains current with market trends, customer expectations, and broader business objectives.Qualifications 10+ years of experience in software, platform, or solution leadership roles, with fintech, banking, or complex regulated-industry experience preferred Bachelor’s degree required in a relevant field (e.g., computer science, information systems, engineering, or business); advanced degree preferred or equivalent practical experience Demonstrated ability to define strategy and priorities for complex, cross-functional initiatives in fast-moving technical environments Strong understanding of modern cloud platforms and distributed systems, with experience aligning demo or solution environments to multi-tenant, platform-based architectures Experience translating customer needs, market trends, and platform capabilities into clear roadmaps and high-impact demonstration experiences Excellent communication and executive presentation skills, with confidence engaging senior stakeholders and external audiences High degree of curiosity and initiative, with a track record of staying current on technology trends that influence platform capabilities and customer expectations Statement to Third Party AgenciesTo ALL recruitment agencies: Candescent only accepts resumes from agencies on the preferred supplier list. Please do not forward resumes to our applicant tracking system, Candescent employees, or any Candescent facility. Candescent is not responsible for any fees or charges associated with unsolicited resumes.

title: Head of Product (B2B SaaS)
description_excerpt: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Product (B2B SaaS) in India.This role is a high-impact leadership position focused on shaping and scaling a product suite powering influencer-led growth and performance marketing infrastructure. You will own end-to-end product strategy, execution, and delivery across multiple product lines, with a strong initial focus on building and scaling a core flagship product. The environment is fast
_full_description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Product (B2B SaaS) in India.This role is a high-impact leadership position focused on shaping and scaling a product suite powering influencer-led growth and performance marketing infrastructure. You will own end-to-end product strategy, execution, and delivery across multiple product lines, with a strong initial focus on building and scaling a core flagship product. The environment is fast-paced, highly iterative, and deeply customer-driven, requiring strong product instincts and the ability to operate in ambiguity. You will work closely with engineering, design, and leadership teams to translate customer insights into scalable product solutions. The role blends strategic thinking with hands-on execution, from roadmap ownership to sprint planning and product delivery. You will also play a key role in defining product metrics, improving user experience, and ensuring consistent shipping velocity. This is a leadership opportunity to build category-defining SaaS infrastructure in a rapidly evolving market.AccountabilitiesOwn the end-to-end product vision, roadmap, and execution across multiple B2B SaaS product lines, ensuring alignment with company strategy and customer needs.Lead customer discovery efforts, including interviews, user research, beta testing, and ongoing feedback loops to deeply understand user pain points and churn drivers.Drive product prioritisation, trade-offs, and sprint planning in close collaboration with engineering and design teams.Own the development and scaling of a core product (initial focus area), ensuring strong execution from concept to delivery.Define product requirements, write detailed specs, and ensure high-quality execution across design, engineering, and UX.Build, track, and optimise key product metrics such as activation, retention, engagement, and usage.Monitor market trends, competitive landscape, and ecosystem shifts (DTC, Shopify, affiliate marketing, influencer growth) to inform product strategy.Ensure high standards of user experience, design consistency, and product usability across all releases.Lead and mentor product and design teams, fostering a culture of ownership, speed, and quality.Collaborate closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to align product direction with business objectives.Requirements8+ years of product management experience, ideally in B2B SaaS environments.Proven experience building products from 0→1, with strong execution and scaling capabilities.Strong product judgment with the ability to make clear prioritisation and trade-off decisions.Deep customer-first mindset with strong user research and discovery skills.Strong design sensibility with attention to UX, usability, and product quality.Experience working in fast-paced, high-ambiguity environments requiring ownership and autonomy.Familiarity with DTC, Shopify, influencer marketing, or affiliate ecosystems is highly desirable.Strong analytical mindset with experience defining and tracking product metrics.Excellent communication and leadership skills, with the ability to align stakeholders across engineering and business teams.Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution and delivery focus.BenefitsCompetitive salary: ₹3,000,000 - ₹4,000,000 per yearFully remote working modelHigh-impact leadership role with ownership of core product strategyOpportunity to build category-defining B2B SaaS infrastructureFast-paced, high-ownership startup environmentDirect collaboration with founders and senior leadershipStrong autonomy in product decision-makingExposure to cutting-edge influencer and performance marketing ecosystemsOpportunity to lead and grow product and design teamsHow Jobgether WorksWe use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether?Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

department: Financial Services, IT Services and IT Consulting, and Technology, Information and Internet
description_excerpt: Our PurposeMastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest pote
_full_description: Our PurposeMastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.Title And SummaryDirector, Product Management – Data and AI PlatformDirector, Product Management – Data and AI PlatformWHO IS MASTERCARD?Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. Our mission is to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships, and passion, our innovations help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.OverviewMastercard is building a cloud-native data platform to power next-generation, data-driven solutions and services. This platform will deliver a data mesh architecture, advanced technologies, and processes that enable Mastercard to scale and innovate at speed.We are seeking a strategic product leader to join our Data and AI Platform team. In this role, you will define the vision, set the long-term strategy, and lead execution for Mastercard’s Data and AI platform. You will collaborate across internal teams and external partners to deliver impactful solutions that align with Mastercard’s enterprise goals. This is an exciting opportunity to shape a Data and AI platform from ground up.What You’ll Do Define and own the product vision and long-term strategy for 2 domains of Mastercard’s Data and AI platform, ensuring alignment with business objectives. Establish domain roadmap(s) that supports critical business areas and platform capabilities including: Data ingestion landing zones Network, IAM, KMS, secrets Compute provisioning & isolation Base SLAs (availability, performance, DR) Partner (Databricks & Snowflake) enablement AI/ML tooling integration Influence and collaborate with stakeholders across engineering, product management, and operations to align platform strategy with business goals. Advocate for and implement modern data architecture principles (data lakes, data warehouses, data meshes) to drive innovation and scalability. Partner closely with engineering counterparts, participating in technical discussions and leading requirement workshops.What You Bring 8+ years of experience leading product teams in the Data & AI space within enterprise environments, ideally in a matrix organization. Hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, and familiarity with AI/ML platforms such as Databricks and Snowflake. Deep understanding of core building blocks and run time services needed to build a Data and AI platform is critical. Deep understanding of the Data and AI platform landscape, architectural patterns, and emerging technologies. Previous experience as a data engineer or data scientist is a strong advantage, especially in building AI/ML solutions for B2B. Ability to foster a product-driven culture and champion best practices across the organization. Proven experience building and leading cross-functional teams (product, design, data/software engineering, security, etc.) but also act as a subject matter expert as needed. Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence at all levels. Entrepreneurial mindset with agility and a bias for action in a fast-paced environment.Why Join Us?At Mastercard, you’ll lead transformative initiatives that shape the future of data and AI in payments and digital commerce. You’ll have the opportunity to innovate at scale, collaborate with world-class teams, and make a global impact.Corporate Security Responsibility All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;Report any suspected information security violation or breach, andComplete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

Our toolkit will enable standardized agentic payments, identity, and accountability, providing a key piece of infrastructure for the coming 1 billion AI agents. AIVM is part of the ChainGPT ecosystem, a pioneer in the decen
_full_description: Head of Product - AIVM (Agentic AI & Blockchain Platform)Location: Remote (Global)Position: Head of ProductCompany: AIVMPosition Type: Full-TimeAbout AIVMAIVM is building the guardrails for the post-human agentic economy, integrating cutting-edge AI and Blockchain technology. Our toolkit will enable standardized agentic payments, identity, and accountability, providing a key piece of infrastructure for the coming 1 billion AI agents. AIVM is part of the ChainGPT ecosystem, a pioneer in the decentralized AI field.About The RoleWe are looking for a highly technical and execution-driven Head of Product to lead one of the most ambitious initiatives in Web3: the AIVM (Artificial Intelligence Virtual Machine).Reporting to the CEO, you will translate AIVM's company vision into product architecture, roadmap, developer experience, and launch execution, including:The Policy Oracle: Cryptographic guardrails that intercept, evaluate, and enforce agent action before executionAgent Identity and Reputation: including emerging standards such as ERC-8004Programmable Payments and Wallet Abstraction: including x402-inspired flowsImmutable Accountability: via execution receipts that make agent actions traceable and auditableWe are currently in a high-velocity, pre-mainnet phase.This is not a conventional SaaS feature-shipping role. You will define primitives, product architecture, developer experience, and ecosystem adoption from pre-mainnet to launch.ResponsibilitiesThe immediate priority is to inherit the current roadmap, pressure-test the core primitives, align engineering and go-to-market, and drive the platform toward testnet/mainnet readiness.Product Vision & Platform StrategyInherit and evolve the existing product vision, roadmap, and platform strategy for the AIVM ecosystemPosition AIVM as a category-defining decentralized AI infrastructure layerTranslate complex technical capabilities into clear product strategy and market positioningPlatform & Ecosystem DesignLead the design of AIVM as a multi-sided platform serving:Agent developers and AI application teamsProtocols and apps integrating autonomous agentsEnterprises needing policy, compliance, and controlled executionNode operators / validators / infrastructure providersData, compute, and model providersDefine core primitives: APIs, SDKs, execution layers, and developer experienceExecution & Product LeadershipBuild and lead a high-performance product functionDrive end-to-end product execution from concept to Mainnet and beyondEstablish product processes that balance speed, quality, and scalabilityPartner deeply with engineering to align on architecture, trade-offs, and deliveryRun product and technical execution rituals to maintain roadmap clarity, accountability, and delivery momentumCross-Functional AlignmentAct as the central bridge between product, engineering, marketing, and business developmentCollaborate on go-to-market strategy, product launches, and narrativeSupport partnerships with strong product thinking and technical clarityData, Metrics & OptimizationDefine and track core product and ecosystem KPIs:Developer adoptionAgent deploymentsNetwork activity and retentionUse insights to continuously refine product direction and prioritiesRequirementsMust have:7+ years of experience in Product Management, including 2-3+ years in leadership rolesTechnical experience is mandatory for this role. The candidate must be able to communicate effectively with our Tech Team and discuss in technical languageOptional(but really important to have): Solid understanding of AI/ML infrastructure (inference, training, compute economics)Experience building platforms, infrastructure products, or developer-facing systemsStrong background in blockchain/Web3, ideally L1, L2, or AI ecosystemsProven ability to define and execute product strategy in complex, emerging marketsStrong Plus:Experience working in remote, fast-paced, high-ownership environmentsUtilizing AI Agents infrastructures for optimization (Claude/OpenClaw)Strong communication and leadership skills with the ability to align technical and non-technical stakeholdersComfortable operating before product-market fit, where the job is to reduce ambiguity, define primitives, and force trade-offsBenefitsCompany Culture and ValuesAt AIVM, we value trust, effective speed, innovation, and growth. title: Sr. Director, Product Management (Core Products)
description_excerpt: About UsHighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one syste
_full_description: About UsHighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.Our peopleWith over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.Our impactEvery month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog PostsWhy This Role ExistsThe Sr. Director, Product Management (Platform & Core Products)  will lead the foundational layer of HighLevel's product stack, spanning infrastructure platforms, automation capabilities, CRM primitives, and shared systems like identity, permissions, notifications, and audit logging.This is a critical org-wide leadership role, owning HighLevel’s platform extensibility, data model reliability, cross-surface consistency, and internal product development velocity. You will manage a team of 25–30 PMs via 3 Group Product Managers and drive strategy, execution, and org design for a portfolio that underpins everything from marketing automation and conversation management to AI-driven workflows and CRM object modeling.You’ll be expected to scale a high-performance product org, influence product direction across pods, and partner closely with engineering to deliver a scalable, secure, and elegant platform for millions of users.Strategic Priorities Build an Extensible Platform: Architect reusable primitives (identity, roles, objects, notifications, reporting) that enable faster development across HighLevel. Modernize Core CRM: Scale performance and usability across contacts, companies, tasks, opportunities, and conversations — the backbone of daily SMB workflows. Unlock Scalable Automation: Advance our workflows engine and Workflow AI to power increasingly complex use cases with speed and simplicity. Drive UX Consistency Across Surfaces: Ensure UI, interaction patterns, and product language are coherent across contact, sub-account, and agency layers. Support Data-Driven Product Maturity: Enforce strong instrumentation, analytics readiness, and reporting across all core products. Operationalize Product Management Excellence: Raise the bar for product planning, prioritization, execution, and accountability across 30+ PMs and APMs.Key Responsibilities Define and drive the long term product vision, roadmap, and success metrics for platform and core product areas. Manage and coach a team ofGroup PMs and PMs,.cultivating a strong leadership bench and ensuring high performance. Serve as the bridge between platform engineering, infra, and product — enabling other teams to move faster through well-designed interfaces and reusable systems. Set quality standards for API design, system performance, scalability, and reliability. Lead cross-functional coordination with design, engineering, QA, support, data, and legal to deliver on-time, high-quality launches. Represent the needs of agencies, sub-accounts, and end contacts in platform and CRM decisions — ensuring we build with deep user empathy. Collaborate with the Product leadership to influence org-wide product strategy, culture, and planning cadences. Lead strategic quarterly and annual planning for the org — bringing clarity to priorities across technical debt, product innovation, and user experience. Act as a thought partner to engineering leadership in shaping architecture and development investment decisions.What Success Looks Like HighLevel’s platform teams are recognised as enablers, not blockers — other pods build faster using your team's APIs, patterns, and systems. CRM primitives and workflows become more reliable, performant, and deeply adopted by our users — visible in activation and retention metrics. The organization experiences clean product ownership, predictable roadmaps, and fast decision-making under your leadership. Workflow AI and Workflow Core support a growing number of use cases without sacrificing speed, reliability, or clarity. The data model becomes flexible and extensible, enabling custom objects, relationships, and analytics without friction. You are viewed as a strategic thought partners and executional anchor for platform and core products at HighLevelIdeal Candidate Profile 12–15+ years in product management, with at least 5+ years managing managers (GPMs,Directors or equivalents). Experience scaling platform and core product orgs in fast-growth B2B SaaS companies, (ideally between $500M-$1B ARR). Deep fluency in CRM, automation platforms, or workflow engines — understands data models, APIs, and system-level product thinking. Prior experience building internal platforms or developer tools that support multiple product teams. Ability to scale orgs, implement processes, and hire/coach high-performing PMs. Technical fluency — capable of earning trust with engineering leads and making calls on infra trade-offs, architecture, and scalability. Familiar with two-tier SaaS, multi-tenant environments, and role-based access control models. Strong written and asynchronous communication skills — capable of driving clarity across functions and time zones.Bonus Points For Experience working on workflow builders, CRM platforms, or marketing automation tools. Background in B2B2SMB or agency-led SaaS models. Exposure to design systems, shared component libraries, or analytics platforms. Hands-on familiarity with platform performance metrics (e.g., P95 latency, Sentry, Grafana). Experience integrating with third-party platforms like Stripe, Meta, Google, or TikTok (even if not leading monetization).Equal Employment Opportunity InformationThe company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government recordkeeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

description_excerpt: About UsVisa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.Join Visa and do work that matte
_full_description: About UsVisa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.Job DescriptionAs a Director of Product Development, the professional will be responsible for leading the Product Development team for Debit / Credit Processing in CEMEA, ensuring compliance with Central Europe, Middle East and Africa regulatory obligations within Pismo’s platform. This includes monitoring established rules and changes in the regulatory landscape and relevant bodies, as well as tracking industry standards, market trends, and technological innovations. The role also involves mapping needs, insights, and feedback from current clients and prospects.Key ResponsibilitiesOversee the development of Debit / Credit Card Products aligned with Central Europe, Middle East and Africa regulatory standards and compliance requirements. Continuously monitor regulatory changes and industry benchmarks to ensure product compliance and competitiveness. Collaborate with engineering and business development teams to evaluate implementation approaches for the product roadmap (build vs. partner). Drive cross-functional collaboration with other teams to deliver integrated solutions. Ensure product quality, including non-functional aspects such as integrity, resilience, and scalability. Understand and anticipate customer needs and market dynamics to inform product strategy. Apply critical thinking and articulate improvements in processes and products. This is a remote position. A remote position does not require job duties be performed within proximity of a Visa office location. Remote positions may be required to be present at a Visa office with scheduled notice.Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.QualificationsBasic Qualifications: 10 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 8 years of work experience with an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters/ MBA/JD/MD) or at least 3 years of work experience with a PhD Preferred Qualifications: 12 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or 8-10 years of experience with an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) or 6+ years of work experience with a PhD 8+ years of experience with CEMEA regulatory standards and compliance frameworks, regional regulators, driving improvements and developing new Credit and Debit Card Processing products. 8+ years in Product Development and Management, specializing in the design and implementation of Credit Card Processing solutions for CEMEA financial institutions. 5 years as Product Director, leading Tribes and Squads focused on the development and support of Issuer Processing Credit and Debit Card Products. Deep understanding of the CEMEA financial market, including product standards, business and regulatory aspects, industry trends, benchmarks, and evolving client needs. Expertise in API integration and microservices architecture within Cloud Computing environments. Proven proficiency in product research and analysis, ensuring data-driven decisions and market alignment. Strong foundation in Regulatory Compliance and Industry Standards, primarily within the CEMEA financial ecosystem. Mandatory experience managing software engineering teams, fostering collaboration and technical excellence. Fintech experience (desirable). Familiarity with Agile methodologies (desirable)Visa is an EEO EmployerQualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.
