description_excerpt: About The CompanyTreebo Hospitality Ventures is India’s most loved brand and one of the largest chains in the budget segment ofhospitality. With a network of 850+ hotels across 120+ cities, Treebo offers travellers the unprecedented valueproposition of high-quality stays at affordable prices wherever they go. We are proud of putting dignity backinto budget travel where earlier the traveller was forced to contend with poor quality and hygiene.Treebo Hospitality Ventures masterfully combines engin
_full_description: About The CompanyTreebo Hospitality Ventures is India’s most loved brand and one of the largest chains in the budget segment ofhospitality. With a network of 850+ hotels across 120+ cities, Treebo offers travellers the unprecedented valueproposition of high-quality stays at affordable prices wherever they go. We are proud of putting dignity backinto budget travel where earlier the traveller was forced to contend with poor quality and hygiene.Treebo Hospitality Ventures masterfully combines engineering prowess with deep hospitality expertise. Ouroperational ethos is clear and focused from Treebo Club, an innovative distribution platform and extremelyrewarding loyalty programme to Hotel Superhero, a cutting-edge SaaS solution and a comprehensive hotelmanagement software.With a strong technological foundation and a passion for hospitality, THV aims to deliver exceptionalexperiences across our diverse portfolio. Our range of brands—Itsy Hotels, Treebo, Treebo Premium andMedalio—provides a symphony of choices that blend quality, comfort and affordability.Treebo is a Great Places to Work certified organisation. We take immense pride in our culture which is built ona strong foundation of 7 values. Some of these values include - “Exhibit Owner Mindset” and “Have thehumility and hunger to learn and help learn”, amongst others. We strongly believe in offering our people -“Treebs”, as they are called - unmatched opportunities to learn and grow. If you’re looking to work at a placethat is built on strong fundamentals of business and professional conduct, Treebo is the place for you.About The RoleAs an Area General Manager, you will be responsible for executing the company’s strategic vision ofdemocratizing the joy of travel. You will be responsible for a given area and the portfolio there in to ensurehighest levels of guest experience, product quality and business & profitability of the assets. While managingthe operations and enabling sales for your portfolio, you will also drive the expansion of our hotel portfolioacross your area and beyond through your network. This is a mission critical role that requires a perfectbalance of delivering operational excellence, relationship management, and a business development mindset.Key Responsibilities - Operational ExcellenceOversee day-to-day operations across multiple hotel properties in your area, ensuring adherence tobrand standards and service benchmarksDrive compliance with Treebo's brand standards and SOPs, health and safety guidelines, and servicequality normsConduct audits, quality assurance checks, and drive corrective/preventive actions through hotel partnersto maintain Treebo standardsAct as the key liaison between the company and hotel partners, ensuring seamless coordination andtimely issue resolutionMonitor and enhance overall guest satisfaction by ensuring prompt and effective service recoverymechanisms Business Development & GrowthIdentify, evaluate, and onboard new hotel properties to expand the company’s portfolio within theassigned areaNegotiate terms of the agreement and ensure complete alignment with Treebo's operating proceduresbefore onboarding any hotelCollaborate with the central business development team to oversee launch process of the signedproperties Sales & MICEDrive regional sales performance by collaborating with internal sales teams and property owners toachieve revenue targets for your portfolioIdentify and push sales POCs to close MICE deals for your portfolio propertiesSupport pricing, promotions, and campaigns to drive business at the property levelEngage with local corporate clients, event organizers, and travel planners to push business to yourportfolio if needed Team & Partner ManagementLead, mentor, and develop on-ground portfolio hotel teams to deliver exceptional guest experience in thesegmentTrain hotel staff in brand values, SOPs, and customer service skills to ensure consistencyBuild strong relationships with hotel owners and partners to foster collaboration and long-termassociationWhat Are We Looking For -Strong communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.4–6 years of experience in hospitality management with demonstrated success in both operations andbusiness development.Proven experience in property acquisition and/or sales in hospitality.Knowledge and experience in the MICE segment is highly desirable.Analytical mindset with problem-solving and decision-making capabilities.Ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.Willingness to travel extensively within the assigned geography.Entrepreneurial approach with a strong focus on execution and accountability.
_work_type: Business Development, General Business, and Quality Assurance

title: Sales Director
description_excerpt: Hydranautics is a part of the Nitto Group of companies and a global leader in the field of integrated membrane solutions which includes reverse osmosis, nanofiltration, ultrafiltration and microfiltration for water, wastewater and process treatment and applications. Currently used on seven continents throughout the world for diverse applications such as seawater desalination, industrial high-purity water, surface water treatment, wastewater treatment and specialty process applications.Here at Hy
_full_description: Hydranautics is a part of the Nitto Group of companies and a global leader in the field of integrated membrane solutions which includes reverse osmosis, nanofiltration, ultrafiltration and microfiltration for water, wastewater and process treatment and applications. Currently used on seven continents throughout the world for diverse applications such as seawater desalination, industrial high-purity water, surface water treatment, wastewater treatment and specialty process applications.Here at Hydranautics, we believe that diversity is key to our competitive advantage. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, age, disability, marital status, domestic partner status or medical condition. We are proud to be a Drug-free, E-Verify and EEO employer.JOB SUMMARY:To drive revenue growth, market expansion, and strategic business development for membrane products (RO, NF, UF) and solutions across India and assigned regions, while leading the sales organization and key customer relationships.Under strategic leadership, provide proposal and project facilitation support to both internal and external customer base. Liaison with team members to effectively manage sales activities and maximize revenue by interfacing with planning and other departments to ensure customer service orders are prioritized on the build-plan.ESSENTIAL DUTIES and/or RESPONSIBILITIES:Sales Strategy & Business Growth:Develop and execute India sales strategy aligned with global business goalsAchieve revenue, margin, and market share targetsIdentify growth opportunities in Industrial water & wastewater, PS and other focus segments.Team Leadership & Organization BuildingLead, mentor, and scale national sales teamSet KPIs, monitor performance, and drive accountabilityBuild high-performance, technically strong sales cultureProvides day-to-day operational leadership to staff including but not limited to selection, training, coaching, mentoring, disciplining, performance management, conflict resolution and review of project deliverables.Cross-Functional Collaboration with the global team members regarding global sales activities and accurately communicates business demands and requirements to facilitate the understanding within the organization.Work with - Global sales leadershipSupply chain / manufacturingApplication Engineering and R&D teamsAlign India strategy with global roadmapMaximizes monthly sales revenue by understanding customer requirements and critical delivery dates and allocating sales orders to optimize monthly build-plans.Communicates the sales forecasts to Planning to ensure all sales orders are entered in the organizational Enterprise Software, e.g., JD Edwards. Connects with planning to prioritize customer orders in the build-plan to maximize monthly sales revenue.Facilitates internal efforts in managing projects from the initial proposal phase through order placement and shipment.Champions and partners with manufacturing, product development, application technology, material management and finance to ensure full compliance with project contract requirements, prompt deliveries and timely payment.Directs customer service department and establishes policy guidelines for the receipt, booking and processing of customer orders.Analyzes order processing system and develops recommendations to improve methodologies and procedures.Other duties as assigned.SUPERVISORY RESPONSIBILITES:Regional Account Executives –InternationalMINIMUM EDUCATION and/or EXPERIENCE:Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, or related field; and 15 years’ directly related experience; or equivalent combination of education and water treatment industry experience (required.)Master’s degree in business administration, Sales, Marketing, Science or Engineering, a plus.KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS and/or ABILITIES:1. Strategic thinking + execution2. Strong negotiation & commercial acumen3. Technical understanding of membrane systems4. Leadership - people & stakeholder management5. Ability to handle complex, project-driven sales cycles6. Proven leadership skills, including team development, team goal setting, conflict resolution, training, mentoring, and coaching.7. Ability to successfully guide in-direct reports who are located remotely.8. Advanced working knowledge of business management principles involved in strategic planning, resource allocation, leadership methodologies and facilitating people and resources.9. Solid understanding of business INCOTERM trade terms, concepts, ideas, logistics, etc. within an international manufacturing environment, including working knowledge of international logistics.10. Strong understanding of manufacturing workflow within a multi-national customer base.11. Solid working knowledge of Commercial Insurance Industry.12. Intermediate or better skills in Microsoft Office Suite e.g., Word, Excel, Outlook, Power Point, Project Management and Customer Relationship Management applications.13. Strong project management and scheduling skills.14. Strong application of critical thinking skills along with exceptional problem-solving skills, including skills in researching, collecting, and analyzing data.15. Exceptional organizational skills, strong attention to details, high accuracy, and strong follow-through.16. Outstanding verbal and written communication skills with ability to read and interpret documents such as safety rules, operating and maintenance instructions and procedure manuals. Ability to write complex reports and correspondence and speak effectively before groups of customers or employees of organization of diverse cultures and languages.17. Strong multi-tasking skills with flexibility to respond to rapidly changing, dynamic processes and/or demands.18. Effectively prioritize based on critical and urgent needs while working independently and with a wide range of staff, departments and cultures and fostering a cooperative spirit.19. Working knowledge of tracking revenue sales using ERP system such as JD Edwards.20. Bilingual or Multi-lingual in languages frequently used within the Nitto Group of Companies employees and/or customers, preferred.

title: Vice President - Business Transformation
description_excerpt: Job DescriptionAbout Citco: The market leader premier provider. The best in the business. At Citco, we’ve been the front-runner in our field since our incorporation in 1948 led to the evolution of the asset servicing sector itself. This pioneering spirit continues to guide us today as we innovate and expand, push beyond the boundaries of our industry, and shape its future. From working exclusively with hedge funds to serving all alternatives, corporations and private clients, our organization ha
_full_description: Job DescriptionAbout Citco: The market leader premier provider. The best in the business. At Citco, we’ve been the front-runner in our field since our incorporation in 1948 led to the evolution of the asset servicing sector itself. This pioneering spirit continues to guide us today as we innovate and expand, push beyond the boundaries of our industry, and shape its future. From working exclusively with hedge funds to serving all alternatives, corporations and private clients, our organization has grown immensely across asset classes and geographies. For us, this progress is a pattern that we’ll only maintain as we move forward, always prioritizing our performance. So, for those who want to play at the top of their game and be at the vanguard of their space, we say: Welcome to Citco.For more information about Citco, please visit www.citco.comResponsibilitiesYour Role:We o ff er you a challenging and rewarding role in an award-winning global, industry-leading business, renowned for excellence. Citco is a great working environment, with opportuni ti es for personal and professional career development.As a core member of our Foundational Platforms team, you will be working with some of the industry’s most accomplished professionals to deliver high-quality work configuration & orchestration solutions that both our clients and Business Units can depend upon.The Vice President will be a key member of the Foundational Platforms team and will play an integral role in servicing; onboarding; designing and delivering work configuration & orchestration solutions within the Citco Group. They will work with multiple and diverse stakeholder-groups from across Business Units to optimize and digitize operational processes in order to deliver position bottom-line results for CitcoDuties In Brief You will own the execution & timely delivery of multiple concurrent projects end-to-end.  Maintain project reporting & project plans used by diverse audiences  Lead working group meetings for all assigned projects  Lead discussions with stakeholders to brainstorm solutions; gather requirements and assess feasibility  Own; review & communicate solution design documents that clearly articulating Problem Statements; As-is & To-be states; User Stories; Proto-types & Success Criteria; business outcomes and gains from proposed solutions  Perform or review all aspects of the project life cycle including but not limited to: scoping, analyzing, developing solutions, RAIDs, reviewing deliverables, from executing to implementing change  Work with senior stakeholders to rollout solutions to target teams / business units  Own User Support & User onboarding; the underlying solution & service improvements analysis & backlog; the team’s service standards  Review product backlog maintenance and grooming to ensure projects are managed effectively  Establish best practices / industry standards while designing solutions  Perform detailed risk analysis and reporting  Mentor; Coach and develop staff to perform successfully in their current roles and progress their careers QualificationsAbout You: Bachelor degree in Management Studies, Business Administration, Finance, Accounting, Economics or related fields  You have 16+ years of experience leveraging agile project management to deliver multiple projects on time and in scope in a fast-paced environment.  Strong Leadership skills and supervisory experience of other professionals  Possess a strategic mindset and find motivation in creatively solving problems  Strong analytical skills with the ability to clearly articulate requirements  Exceptional communications skills, both written and oral, and the ability to capture a diverse audience  Able to present solutions to diverse audiences in a consumable format  Ability to multi-task and effectively manage competing priorities  Confident in leading requirements gathering sessions  Well-versed using Confluence & JIRA to manage projects  Experience creating process flows, user stories, acceptance criteria, design documentation and wireframes (proto-types) in order to clearly communicate a set of functional requirements Assets Significant experience in the Financial Services industry  Business Analysis certified  Practical application with Business Process Management / Workflow applications Key Competencies Service-minded, proactive Self-Starter  Great time-management  Leader & Team Player, who can work independently  Analytical Problem Solver, with the ability to think outside-the-box  Positive, organized & goal-oriented mindset  Perceptible to change  Adaptable & Accountable Our BenefitsYour well-being is of paramount importance to us, and central to our success. We provide a range of benefits, training and education support, and flexible working arrangements to help you achieve success in your career while balancing personal needs. Ask us about specific benefits in your location.We recognize diversity as a source of organizational pride and strength. We have made it a priority to reflect our nation’s evolving diversity in the people we hire, and the culture we create in our organization.Citco welcomes and encourages applications from people with disabilities. Accommodations are available upon request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection.

title: Global Head of CGI
description_excerpt: Brandtech+ (formerly known as OLIVER+) is a global team of creative thinkers, tech-savvy trendsetters, and production pros specialising in film, CGI, automation, AI, motion design, and digital/print content. We partner with over 300 clients in 40+ countries and counting. Our focus is to connect clients with high-quality solutions, talent and ambitious opportunities worldwide.  As a part of The Brandtech Group, we're at the forefront of leveraging cutting-edge AI technology to revolutionise how w
_full_description: Brandtech+ (formerly known as OLIVER+) is a global team of creative thinkers, tech-savvy trendsetters, and production pros specialising in film, CGI, automation, AI, motion design, and digital/print content. We partner with over 300 clients in 40+ countries and counting. Our focus is to connect clients with high-quality solutions, talent and ambitious opportunities worldwide.  As a part of The Brandtech Group, we're at the forefront of leveraging cutting-edge AI technology to revolutionise how we create and deliver work. Our AI solutions enhance efficiency, spark creativity, and drive insightful decision-making, empowering our teams to produce innovative and impactful results.  Role: Global Head of CGI  Location: India (Remote working until further notice)About the role: We are seeking a visionary Creative Director (Lead) with deep, hands-on CGI expertise and proficiency in AI technologies to lead our world-class CGI/3D team in delivering visually stunning, high-impact creative work for global brands. This is a leadership role for someone who thrives at the intersection of art, design, storytelling, and cutting-edge technology - equally confident setting a bold creative vision, leveraging Ai-driven innovation and providing precise hands-on direction. You will drive creative excellence across large-scale CGI productions, oversee the growth and development of the global team, and ensure our output pushes the boundaries of what’s possible. Those with experience leading global campaigns and digital content for renowned brands across FMCG, Luxury, Premium Global Brands, and Technology sectors will have a distinct advantage. This is a dynamic role requiring adaptability, collaboration, and the ability to juggle multiple high-priority projects in a fast-paced environment. What You'll be Doing: Lead and Oversee Projects: Own the end-to-end delivery of CGI projects, ensuring high-quality output that exceeds expectations, leveraging AI-enhanced workflows where appropriate to boost efficiency and creativity. Creative Direction: Establish creative and technical direction for all CGI content, including sequence setup, lighting, rendering, and final delivery. Ensure the highest standard of work across all projects. Mentorship and Team Development: Lead, mentor, and inspire a team of 3D artists and CG Team leads, providing guidance, constructive feedback, and career development opportunities. Motivate and influence the CG team to constantly strive for excellence in performance.  Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with Producers and Team leads to align on project objectives and deliverables. Resource Management: Allocate team resources effectively across multiple projects to meet deadlines and maintain quality. Ensure Technical Excellence: Oversee the readiness of assets for review, troubleshoot technical challenges, and ensure that projects align with the latest CGI techniques, AI innovations and industry best practices. Drive Innovation: Explore new tools, techniques, and workflows to push the boundaries of CGI and deliver innovative solutions. Investigate, propose and implement innovative ways of delivering CGI services to maximise efficiency and productivity  Client Interaction: Act as a client-facing representative for all CGI work, presenting ideas, discussing progress, and ensuring their vision is brought to life. Brand Stewardship: Be a brand guardian by maintaining visual consistency and fidelity across all projects.  What you’ll need:  Extensive Expertise in CGI: Proven experience in Data prep, lighting, compositing, texturing, and animation for both stills and animation. Technical Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Cinema4D + Octane and 3DsMax + Vray. Experience with other tools like Unreal Engine, Maya, Blender, or Redshift is a bonus. Leadership Skills: Demonstrated ability to lead and inspire teams, manage resources, and deliver high-quality work under tight deadlines. Strategic Vision: Strong creative and technical vision, with the ability to set and communicate benchmarks for the team. Client Management: Excellent client-facing skills, with the ability to present, defend, and sell ideas effectively. Proficiency in Advanced Tools: Adobe Creative Suite (After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere). Advanced texturing tools like Adobe Substance Painter and Designer. Unreal Engine or other real-time rendering tools would be desirable  Strong Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English. Project Ownership: Ability to take projects from concept to completion, while managing time, resources, and client expectations. Eye for Detail: Impeccable attention to detail and quality assurance. Curiosity and Innovation: A desire to continuously learn, explore, and implement cutting-edge CGI practices.   Business Development : Attend client meetings, present work, discuss needs and identify opportunities.   You’ll have:  A relevant degree, diploma, or equivalent experience in CGI, Animation, or a related field. A strong showreel showcasing CGI projects, including product visualization and animation. At least 10+ years of experience in CGI/3D, with at least 3-5 years of team management experience.  As a business we're committed to ensuring everyone on our team is fully trained and confident in using Pencil AI, and other approved AI tools. A wide range of Internal resources are available to make sure our teams stay ahead of the AI curve: training, webinars, newsletters, AI communities etc.  You would be responsible for both you and your teams to be actively AI proficient and keeping up to date by:  Completing ongoing, structured [IIG] AI training including Pencil.  Continuously up-skilling using our approved AI tools including Pencil.  Stay up to date with evolving AI trends through our newsletters, webinars, hackathons, AI communities etc  Facilitate collaborative knowledge-sharing sessions to foster an open exchange of AI expertise and embrace our culture of Learning.    Required experience   As the senior design practitioner within the Creative team, the Creative Director will combine first-class design expertise, creativity and thought leadership with commercial acumen and leadership gravitas.  Req ID - 14468 #BTG+  Our values shape everything we do: Be Ambitious to succeed   Be Imaginative to push the boundaries of what’s possible   Be Inspirational to do groundbreaking work   Be always learning and listening to understand   Be Results-focused  to exceed expectations   Be actively pro-inclusive and anti-racist across our community, clients and creations    Brandtech+, a part of the Brandtech Group, is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive working environment where all employees are encouraged to reach their full potential, and individual differences are valued and respected. All applicants shall be considered for employment without regard to race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, neurodivergence, disability status, or any other characteristic protected by local laws.   Brandtech+ has set ambitious environmental goals around sustainability, with science-based emissions reduction targets. Collectively, we work towards our mission, embedding sustainability into every department and through every stage of the project lifecycle.'

title: Head of Reservations
description_excerpt: About the RoleWe are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of Reservations to lead our centralized reservations function and manage the entire reservations department. This role will oversee all aspects of reservation operations, with a strong focus on service excellence, operational efficiency, and revenue performance.The ideal candidate will bring substantial experience specifically in reservations and/or business development within hospitality, travel, or call center environments, and wil
_full_description: About the RoleWe are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of Reservations to lead our centralized reservations function and manage the entire reservations department. This role will oversee all aspects of reservation operations, with a strong focus on service excellence, operational efficiency, and revenue performance.The ideal candidate will bring substantial experience specifically in reservations and/or business development within hospitality, travel, or call center environments, and will excel at balancing people leadership, system optimization, and commercial strategy to drive conversion, upselling, and overall revenue growth.Key ResponsibilitiesLead, mentor, and develop a high-performing reservations team of 100+ agents, supervisors, and leads.Oversee hiring, training, performance management, and organizational structure for the department.Define and track KPIs for conversion, service quality, response times, and booking accuracy.Optimize reservation workflows, staffing models, and scheduling to maximize productivity and guest satisfaction.Partner with Revenue Management to align reservation strategies with occupancy and revenue goals.Drive upselling and cross-selling initiatives to increase average booking value and overall profitability.Ensure all guest interactions deliver consistent, brand-aligned service across phone, email, and digital channels.Manage escalations, complex bookings, and VIP reservations with professionalism and discretion.Oversee system performance and enhancements across PMS, CRS, and CRM platforms in collaboration with IT and Product teams.Analyze performance data to identify trends, forecast demand, and present insights to senior leadership.Collaborate with Marketing, Operations, and Finance on campaigns, forecasting, and staffing budgets.Champion a culture of excellence, accountability, and continuous improvement across the department.QualificationsBachelor’s degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).6+ years of progressive experience in hospitality reservations, call center, or revenue operations.2+ years in a senior leadership role managing large teams.Strong analytical, financial, and system management skills.Proven record of improving conversion, efficiency, and service quality in a large-scale environment.Exceptional communication, leadership, and stakeholder management capabilities.Additional DetailsWork Location: Remote (India)Shift: Night shift aligned with US time zonesSalary: ₹20,00,000 – ₹25,00,000 per annum (based on experience)

title: Business Manager

This role involves managing a team of employees and consultants, achieving profitability goals, and ensuring efficient operations. _full_description: Position SummaryThe Business Manager is responsible for overseeing the business operations within the assigned region. This role involves managing a team of employees and consultants, achieving profitability goals, and ensuring efficient operations. The Business Manager collaborates closely with internal stakeholders and external customers to drive growth, execute strategic plans, and ensure compliance with, LEGAL, regulatory and quality standards. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in sales, market development, and key account management, with a focus on driving sustainable, profitable growth. Additional knowledge and experience on product registration will be preferred.Role ResponsibilitiesAchieve annual profitability goals by managing the regional team, portfolio, and strategy, reflected in the region's P&L.Establish annual working plans with internal stakeholders and key customers to capture growth opportunities for products in the region.Oversee daily operations, including budget management and setting performance objectives for the team.Design and execute annual product plans and longer-term projections to meet sales and profit objectives in collaboration with product managers.Provide input into pricing and sales terms annually, ensuring balance and efficiency in market approach.Develop and implement business, marketing, and advertising strategies to support regional growth.Identify and execute distribution changes and optimize the overall go-to-market strategy.Manage relationships with internal and external stakeholders, negotiating contracts and fostering collaboration.Plan, evaluate, and optimize operational processes to ensure cost-effectiveness and efficiency.Ensure compliance with regulatory and quality standards for all products and services in the region.Prepare and present monthly, quarterly, and annual statements, analysis, and reports on operations and financial performance.Provide input into the annual budgeting process to align with product strategies and regional growth objectives.Address escalated customer issues, incident reports, and legal matters as necessary.As the regional Sales & Marketing Team Leader, ensure quality service by establishing and enforcing organizational standards and compliance.Developing trial protocols, coordination with the universities and CROs for data generation and knowledge on registration process will be required.Education Bachelor’s degree in Business, Agriculture, or a related field. Advanced degree (MBA or equivalent) is preferred.Experience / Skills / Abilities Minimum of 10 - 15 years of experience in the agrochemical business, with a strong focus on sales, market development, and account management. Proven experience managing key accounts and customers, with a track record of successful contract negotiations, A/R CONTROL and strategic partnerships. Demonstrated ability to develop and execute business strategies, with a focus on profitability and growth. Strong leadership skills with experience managing employees and consultants. Fluency in English is essential; proficiency in other languages is a plus. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build strong relationships with internal teams and external stakeholders. Ability to work collaboratively, manage resources effectively, and ensure maximum return on investment. Experience managing sales teams and organizations is a plus. Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to make data-driven decisions.Job Expectations / Working Conditions Ability to travel frequently within the assigned region to meet with customers, distributors, and attend industry events. Hybrid/remote working flexibility, depending on the geographic location. Must be able to manage multiple priorities and work in a fast-paced environment. Strong commitment to achieving business goals and driving the company’s success in the region.

title: Sales Director
description_excerpt: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. _full_description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Sales Director in India.This is a senior commercial leadership role focused on driving global revenue growth across key regions including the USA, EMEA, and APAC within the semiconductor IP and silicon solutions space. You will be responsible for leading strategic sales initiatives, expanding key accounts, and identifying new business opportunities in highly technical and competitive markets. The role requires a strong blend of commercial acumen and technical understanding, enabling you to engage effectively with engineering-driven customers and executive stakeholders. You will collaborate closely with product and marketing teams to align market needs with technology roadmaps and go-to-market strategies. The environment is fast-paced, global, and highly cross-functional, requiring strong execution discipline and strategic thinking. This is a high-impact role where your leadership directly influences revenue growth and market expansion.AccountabilitiesDevelop and execute regional and global sales strategies across USA, EMEA, and APAC to drive revenue growth and market penetrationManage and grow key strategic accounts, ensuring achievement of revenue targets, bookings, and design win objectivesBuild and maintain strong relationships with senior-level customer stakeholders and industry partnersForecast sales pipelines accurately and proactively identify new business opportunities and emerging market trendsCollaborate with product and marketing teams to align customer requirements with roadmap priorities and product strategySupport go-to-market planning and execution for new product launches in coordination with global and regional teamsAnalyze competitor activity, market dynamics, and customer feedback to refine sales strategies and positioningRequirementsBachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related technical field preferred10+ years of experience in sales, business development, or account management within the semiconductor or silicon IP industryProven track record of consistently exceeding sales targets and driving significant account growthStrong technical understanding of semiconductor technologies, including interface subsystems, memory IP, or security IP solutionsExcellent communication, presentation, negotiation, and relationship-building skills at executive levelExperience using CRM systems such as Salesforce and data-driven forecasting toolsStrong strategic thinking with ability to balance long-term planning and hands-on executionAbility to work effectively across global teams and multiple time zonesNice to have: established network within semiconductor, OEM, or technology ecosystemBenefitsCompetitive compensation package aligned with senior leadership responsibilitiesPerformance-based incentives tied to revenue and growth achievementsExposure to cutting-edge semiconductor IP and silicon technology solutionsHigh-impact leadership role with direct influence on global business strategyCollaborative, cross-functional, and innovation-driven work environmentCareer growth opportunities within a fast-scaling technical organizationAdditional benefits and details shared during the hiring processHow Jobgether WorksWe use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether?Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

_full_description: Our Company:Teradata is the connected multi-cloud data platform for enterprise analytics company.  Our enterprise analytics solve business challenges from start to scale.  Only Teradata gives you the flexibility to handle the massive and mixed data workloads of the future, today.  The Teradata Vantage architecture is cloud native, delivered as-a-service, and built on an open ecosystem.  These design features make Vantage the ideal platform to optimize price performance in a multi-cloud environment. Ignite the Future of Language with AI at Teradata!What You’ll DoAs Senior Director, AI Engineering (AI Marketplace), you will:   Lead the engineering strategy and execution for Teradata’s AI Marketplace platformOwn the end‑to‑end marketplace lifecycle, including:Partner and product onboardingListings, search, and recommendationsAccess management and governanceRatings, reviews, and trust signalsBilling, monetization, and entitlementsDeployment and operational integrationManage and mentor senior engineering leaders, including:Senior Engineering ManagersPrincipal EngineersSenior Staff EngineersDefine platform architecture and build high‑quality, scalable distributed systemsDrive technical excellence, reliability, security, performance, and operational readinessPartner closely with Product Management, Design, Security, Cloud Operations, and Go‑to‑Market teamsEstablish strong engineering practices across:SDLC, CI/CD, and DevOpsObservability, monitoring, and production operationsQuality, availability, and security standardsFoster a culture of innovation, accountability, inclusion, and continuous improvementWho You’ll Work WithYou will collaborate cross‑functionally with teams across Engineering, Product, Design, Security, Cloud Infrastructure, and Enterprise Architecture.  Reporting to a senior engineering executive, you will work closely with stakeholders across Teradata to align on strategy, prioritize investments, and drive successful product adoption. Required Qualifications (Non‑Negotiable)  Proven experience leading large‑scale engineering organizations, including multiple managers and teamsDeep expertise in building and operating distributed systems and cloud‑native platformsStrong backend engineering background (e. g. , Java, microservices, RESTful APIs)Hands‑on experience with:Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)Containerization and orchestration (Kubernetes, Docker)Data systems (SQL and NoSQL)Messaging and streaming technologies (e. g. , Kafka)UI or platform‑adjacent frontend technologiesFamiliarity with AI/ML ecosystems, including:Large Language Models (LLMs)Agentic AI frameworksAI developer or productivity toolsPreferred Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent practical experience)Typically 18+ years of engineering experience, including 5+ years leading senior engineering leadersStrong understanding of:System design and architecture patternsAPI‑driven and platform ecosystemsModern UI frameworks and developer experienceExperience building or scaling marketplace, platform, or SaaS productsExpertise in CI/CD pipelines, observability, reliability engineering, and production operationsExperience working in multi‑cloud or hybrid cloud environmentsStrong executive‑level communication, stakeholder influence, and decision‑making skillsAbility to thrive in fast‑moving, ambiguous environmentsDemonstrated commitment to inclusive leadership, team development, and engineering excellenceWhy You’ll Love Working at TeradataPeople‑first culture built on trust, flexibility, and wellbeingFlexible work model empowering you to choose how and where you workStrong commitment to Diversity, Equity, and InclusionAn antiracist organization dedicated to creating an environment where everyone can thriveOpportunity to shape enterprise‑scale AI platforms used by some of the world’s largest organizationsWhy We Think You’ll Love TeradataWe prioritize a people-first culture because we know our people are at the very heart of our success. We embrace a flexible work model because we trust our people to make decisions about how, when, and where they work. We focus on well-being because we care about our people and their ability to thrive both personally and professionally. We are an anti-racist company because our dedication to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is more than a statement. It is a deep commitment to doing the work to foster an equitable environment that celebrates people for all of who they are.Teradata invites all identities and backgrounds in the workplace. We work with deliberation and intent to ensure we are cultivating collaboration and inclusivity across our global organization. ​ We are proud to be an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. title: Senior Engineering Director

_full_description: Company OverviewDocusign brings agreements to life. Over 1.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the #1 company in e-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM).What you'll doWe are seeking an experienced Senior Director of Engineering to lead multiple teams across the US and Bangalore locations and serve as a critical senior leader within the Builders and Partners Engineering (BxP) organization. In this role, you will oversee software engineers responsible for designing, building and deploying end to end solutions that accelerate Enterprise readiness for Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) - you will work with product, partner, research and design teams to address top requirements blocking sales and adoption of strategic IAM Enterprise customers. You will be partnering closely across vertical platform and product teams to enable collaboration and changes needed across IAM product/platform stack for Enterprise solutioning. As a senior leader in Bangalore, you will establish a center of gravity and provide the strategic thinking necessary to maximize the success and impact of Engineering teams. Finally, you will be responsible for attracting key talent and maintaining high performance to ensure BxP remains a best-in-class organization as its presence grows.This position is a people manager role reporting to the Vice President, BxP, Engineering.ResponsibilityLead and manage multiple Engineering teams responsible for developing features of business or related technology solutions across multiple product/service linesHire and mentor top talent while building a solid engineering organization on a foundation of execution, innovation and learningEngineer execution and product delivery while managing the technical debt and upleveling the engineering operational excellenceChampion the culture, processes, and tools required to maintain a frictionless high-quality development environment while being an expert at agile continuous delivery, DevOps and TDD/BDDDive deep into technology and are on the forefront of the latest tools, technologies, and strategies and help evaluate, prototype, and introduce them to our teamProvide coaching and leadership in software best practices, automated test strategies, and work toward flattening the cost of change curve for our software products and servicesPrioritize great user experiences and be a partner to product management and engineering, sales, operations, and other parts of the businessBe a hands-on technical resource who directs product and technology teams to conceptualize, build and deploy products in a fast-paced agile environmentLead a geographically dispersed teams - you are an expert at leading geographically distributed and matrixed organizationsChampion the culture, processes, and tools required to maintain a frictionless high-quality development environment while being an expert at agile continuous delivery, DevOps and TDD/BDDProvide coaching and leadership in software best practices, automated test strategies, and work toward flattening the cost of change curve for our software products and servicesJob DesignationHybrid: Employee divides their time between in-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in-office expectation)Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law.What you bringBasic15+ years of combined software development & management experience across multiple languages and frameworks or equivalent experience10+ years hands on software development or equivalent experience and present-day coding contributionsSignificant experience leading and managing globally distributed Engineering teams across multiple product/service lines, in a matrix’ed environmentPreferredExcellent stakeholder management and communication across time zones and be able to influence senior leaders and align diverse teamsDemonstrated ownership of production-grade services with high-availabilityYou are a master strategist who establishes strategic metrics alongside long range vision for application/use across the domain and works w/ other leaders to aggregate key findings and define strategies to improve technology solutionsYou obsess over customer experiences and will be a strong and trusted partner to product management/engineering, sales, operations, and other parts of the businessYou thrive in a fast paced, execution driven environmentPrior Experience building end to end solutions in the Enterprise SaaS areaHands-on depth in one or more stacks (e.g., .NET, Java, Node/Python) and modern build systemsExperience leading and collaborating with distributed teams across India and USAExperience with distributed backend systems that involved REST API abstraction layers in complex enterprise environments with SOA and ROA or equivalentDemonstrated track record of being a change agent, leaving every team and process better than you found itLife at DocusignWorking hereDocusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal.We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live.AccommodationDocusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com.If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice

_full_description: Hydranautics is a part of the Nitto Group of companies and one of the global leaders in the field of integrated membrane solutions. We offer complete membrane solutions like reverse osmosis, nanofiltration, ultrafiltration and microfiltration for water, waste water and process treatment and applications. Hydranautics membrane-based solutions are currently in use on seven continents throughout the world for diverse applications such as seawater desalination, industrial high-purity water, surface water treatment, waste water treatment and specialty process applications.Position OverviewTo drive revenue growth, market expansion, and strategic business development for membrane products (RO, NF, UF) and solutions across India and assigned regions, while leading the sales organization and key customer relationships.Under strategic leadership, provide proposal and project facilitation support to both internal and external customer base. Liaison with team members to effectively manage sales activities and maximize revenue by interfacing with planning and other departments to ensure customer service orders are prioritized on the build-plan.ESSENTIAL DUTIES And/or RESPONSIBILITIESSales Strategy & Business Growth:Develop and execute India sales strategy aligned with global business goalsAchieve revenue, margin, and market share targetsIdentify growth opportunities in Industrial water & wastewater, PS and other focus segments.Team Leadership & Organization BuildingLead, mentor, and scale national sales teamSet KPIs, monitor performance, and drive accountabilityBuild high-performance, technically strong sales cultureProvides day-to-day operational leadership to staff including but not limited to selection, training, coaching, mentoring, disciplining, performance management, conflict resolution and review of project deliverables.Cross-Functional Collaboration with the global team members regarding global sales activities and accurately communicates business demands and requirements to facilitate the understanding within the organization.Work with - Global sales leadershipSupply chain / manufacturing Application Engineering and R&D teamsAlign India strategy with global roadmapMaximizes monthly sales revenue by understanding customer requirements and critical delivery dates and allocating sales orders to optimize monthly build-plans.Communicates the sales forecasts to Planning to ensure all sales orders are entered in the organizational Enterprise Software, e.g., JD Edwards. Connects with planning to prioritize customer orders in the build-plan to maximize monthly sales revenue.Facilitates internal efforts in managing projects from the initial proposal phase through order placement and shipment.Champions and partners with manufacturing, product development, application technology, material management and finance to ensure full compliance with project contract requirements, prompt deliveries and timely payment.Directs customer service department and establishes policy guidelines for the receipt, booking and processing of customer orders.Analyzes order processing system and develops recommendations to improve methodologies and procedures.Other duties as assigned.Supervisory ResponsibilitesRegional Account Executives – IINTLKNOWLEDGE, SKILLS And/or ABILITIESStrategic thinking + executionStrong negotiation & commercial acumenTechnical understanding of membrane systemsLeadership - people & stakeholder managementAbility to handle complex, project-driven sales cyclesProven leadership skills, including team development, team goal setting, conflict resolution, training, mentoring, and coaching.Ability to successfully guide in-direct reports who are located remotely.Advanced working knowledge of business management principles involved in strategic planning, resource allocation, leadership methodologies and facilitating people and resources.Solid understanding of business INCOTERM trade terms, concepts, ideas, logistics, etc. within an international manufacturing environment, including working knowledge of international logistics.Strong understanding of manufacturing workflow within a multi-national customer base.Solid working knowledge of Commercial Insurance Industry.Intermediate or better skills in Microsoft Office Suite e.g., Word, Excel, Outlook, Power Point, Project Management and Customer Relationship Management applications.Strong project management and scheduling skills.Strong application of critical thinking skills along with exceptional problem-solving skills, including skills in researching, collecting, and analyzing data.Exceptional organizational skills, strong attention to details, high accuracy, and strong follow-through.Outstanding verbal and written communication skills with ability to read and interpret documents such as safety rules, operating and maintenance instructions and procedure manuals. Ability to write complex reports and correspondence and speak effectively before groups of customers or employees of organization of diverse cultures and languages.Strong multi-tasking skills with flexibility to respond to rapidly changing, dynamic processes and/or demands.Effectively prioritize based on critical and urgent needs while working independently and with a wide range of staff, departments and cultures and fostering a cooperative spirit.Working knowledge of tracking revenue sales using ERP system such as JD Edwards.Bilingual or Multi-lingual in languages frequently used within the Nitto Group of Companies employees and/or customers, preferred.MINIMUM EDUCATION And/or EXPERIENCEBachelor’s degree in Engineering, or related field; and 15 years’ directly related experience; or equivalent combination of education and experience.Master’s degree in business administration, Sales, Marketing, Science or Engineering, a plus.CertificationsPHYSICAL DEMANDS And/or WORK ENVIRONMENT(Typical physical demands and the work environment characteristics an employee must meet and encounter while performing the essential functions of the job. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.) The employee works in a typical office environment with prolonged periods in front of a computer workstation.Sitting from 50% of the time; talking, hearing, seeing regularly up to 80%; fingering, grasping frequently 30-50%; standing and walking frequently 20-30%; reaching with hands and arms occasionally 10-25%; lifting/pulling/pushing up to 25 pounds occasionally 5-10%, with or without assistance.Employee may need to use a keyboard for up to 50% of the time.Must be able to work extended hours and travel per the demands of the business.Hydranautics offers a competitive compensation and benefits package. We believe diversity is key to our competitive advantage and value the diversity among our employees. We are proud to be an EEO employer.

_full_description: The opportunityWe are looking for an engaging person and driven person to contribute to the digital transformation of GPQSS by owning digital product requirements, managing end-to-end project execution, and coordinating developments and integrations across the broader Hitachi Energy digital ecosystem. The role ensures GPQSS digital solutions evolve cohesively with enterprise platforms, engineering tools, and service workflows.How You’ll Make An ImpactProduct Ownership & Requirements Leadership: maintain and cascade product requirements, conducting ongoing reviews to ensure alignment with the GPQSS roadmap and stakeholder needs, translating diverse business and technical needs into actionable tasks, and prioritizing releases to meet digital transformation goals.Digital Project & Program Management: manage product requirements and project execution, coordinating across engineering, R&D, platforms, and service teams, and ensuring compliance with governance standards and effective communication throughout project deliveryDigital transformation leadership: drive the roadmap for GPQSS-aligned digital solutions, including integrations with core engineering and design systems, PLM and data governance platforms, service and operations digital tools, AI- and analytics-driven modulesStakeholder Engagement & Communication: act as the central point of contact between engineering, digital teams, product owners, program managers, and business ownerAgile Delivery & Team Enablement: Promote Agile approaches, iterative development, and continuous feedback loops, consistent with expectations for digital teams. Remove impediments, streamline workflows, and enable predictable execution across distributed teams. Support sprint planning, backlog refinement, and delivery ceremonies.Your backgroundBachelor / Master Degree in engineering, computer science, or a related technical field.Proven experience owning digital product development and managing complex digital software projects.Proven experience in managing projects end to end, including product-minded developments.Knowledge and understanding of system integrations, data flows, user experience (UX) and digital architecture fundamentals.Proven ability to collaborate across global teams (internal and consultants), engineering domains, and business functions.Strong communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.You work in a structured way, applying relevant methods, procedures, and tools. You practice using and creating documentation, both internal (e.g., project descriptions, proposals) and external facing (e.g., user documentation).Excellent spoken and written communication abilities in English.Preferred QualificationsExperience with engineering design tools, configurators, or PLM ecosystems.Familiarity with agile methodologies.Understanding of cybersecurity and quality governance within product development.What We OfferCollective agreementFlexible working hoursHealth care and wellness allowanceFantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy, both within Sweden and globallyVarious training and education supporting employee developmentDiversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in SwedenSupplementary compensation for parental leaveEmployee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perksMore About UsAre you ready for a new exciting challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today!Recruiting Manager Alexandru Moga, alexandru.moga@hitachienergy.com will answer your questions about the position. Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Nawzad Rashid +46 (10) 7389148;  Unionen: Karin Ulvemark +46 107-38 51 42; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 107-38 70 43. All other questions can be directed to Talent Acquisition Partner Filip Henriksson, filip.henriksson@hitachienergy.comHitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future through innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.With over a century in pioneering mission-critical technologies like high-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD. We welcome you to apply today.

_full_description: About RateGainRateGain Travel Technologies Limited is a global provider of AI-powered SaaS solutions for travel and hospitality that works with 16,000+ customers and 700+ partners in 100+ countries helping them accelerate revenue generation through acquisition, retention, and wallet share expansion.RateGain today is one of the world’s largest processors of electronic transactions, price points, and travel intent data helping revenue management, distribution and marketing teams across hotels, airlines, meta-search companies, package providers, car rentals, travel management companies, cruises and ferries drive better outcomes for their business.Founded in 2004 and headquartered in India, today RateGain works with 26 of the Top 33 Hotel Chains, 25 of the Top 30 Online Travel Agents, 4 of the Top 5 Airlines, and all the top car rentals, including 25 Global Fortune 500 companies in unlocking new revenue every day.What we are looking to hire:We are looking for a proven leader to drive a high-impact Customer Success function for RevAI, shaping it into a predictable growth engine.This leader will ensure customers consistently realize measurable business impact and ROI, while driving strong retention (NRR >120%) and sustainable expansion across enterprise accounts. They will work closely with a lean team, focusing on quality execution, customer outcomes, and scalable processes rather than large-scale team expansion.The ideal candidate will establish RateGain as a trusted, strategic revenue intelligence partner to customers across the US, Europe, and global markets, embedding RevAI into their core decision-making processes.Primary Responsibilities:Own Global _full_description: Description & RequirementsElectronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.Development Director - Slingshot StudioWhat a Development Director Does At EADevelopment Directors (DDs) work with their teams to build and maintain project plans and schedules to deliver on Slingshot Studio’s strategic new product development or live service games. They play a vital role in successfully transitioning the team from one project phase to the next while ensuring a strong focus on quality, collaboration, and communication.Development Director at Slingshot Studio, lead the charge in building prototypes and guiding the development team through the creation of games from scratch, ensuring alignment with strategic product roadmaps while maintaining a strong focus on quality, collaboration, and innovation.Key Responsibilities Prototype and Game Development Leadership Lead the development of game prototypes, transforming concepts into playable experiences. Collaborate closely with Game Team Leadership to plan and execute live service operations, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery. Project Management and Execution Develop and maintain project plans and schedules, balancing scope and resources to meet strategic goals. Facilitate collaboration across disciplines, enhancing efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and quality. Reviews how work is being done end-to-end across teams to ensure processes and workflows are efficient and effective. Identify systemic risks and implement corrective actions across multiple project cycles. Drive continuous process improvements, focusing on quality and efficiency. Help communicate feedback to the relevant parties to ensure there is an effective channel for continuous improvement. Motivating and Enabling Teams Encourages autonomy and ownership, empowering the team to solve problems proactively. Recognises and celebrates successes, fostering engagement and a strong sense of shared accountability. Communication and Collaboration Communicate clearly and intentionally with team members and external stakeholders. Build and maintain effective working relationships, fostering a positive impact on project completion. Ensure project documentation is current and accurately reflects the project's status. Leadership & People Management: Build and nurture a high-performing team, providing coaching and development opportunities. Maintain regular communication with project teams and coordinate with external partners.Requirements 5 to 8 years of project management or team leadership experience. Proven experience in a fast-paced mobile prototyping environment, with a track record of building games from scratch, preferably mid-core games targeted to the global audience. Strong ability to communicate visual and quality targets effectively. Solid foundation in project management frameworks and tools. Adaptability and iterative problem-solving skills. Excellent oral and written communication skills.Good To Have Hands on experience in Unity Game EngineThe Perks Hybrid work model. Modern office environment with a gaming area. Opportunity to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic industry.About Electronic ArtsWe’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

_full_description: At Eaton India Innovation Center, we are looking for a Director - Electrical Sector Global.Job SummaryThe purpose of this leadership role is to lead GEIS (Global Energy Infrastructure Solutions) and EMEA in EIIC (Eaton India Innovation Center) Engineering Organization, drive IoT platform strategy across & effectively insert them across the broader electrical sector (working with various EIIC divisional groups).Work directly with regional general managers (including GEIS India and China GM) and drive additional growth in the region, drive re-use, common process and platforms across various EIIC groups and including EMEA site.Drive stronger integration with the local research labs team (ERL India) and mature product insertions quicker. The role needs to define product ownership and execution strategies for the identified product lines from the global GEIS organization (50% of global head count is in EIIC). This includes organization skill and talent build up, deeply integrating cross functionally across the plants, product management and engineering, developing deep product technical expertise to peform wall to wall ownership (concept to launch and after-market support) and bring-in differentiated solutions to market. Responsible for Implementing strategies focused around Electrical Product which encompasses EMEA PMCC, Critical Systems, VAVE & Energy Transition and Digitalization teams for product design life experience along with expanded job responsibilities for APAC region.Work with Product engineering directors to formulate & execute MGPP and MGTP in sync with growth goals for EMEA and APAC.Shape Focus area and build portfolio that matters. Define clear road map for next 3 - 5 years and execute action items to mitigate identified gaps. Leverage newly built EIIC ecosystem for prototype and validation to accelerate time to market. Build footprint and define capability roadmap in APAC region through regional growth strategy at organization level.Define DMP strategy for EMEA and APAC division in line with global DMP targets. Shape and execute big bet projects. Identify DtV projects and execute identified DtV projects as per VA ProLaunch methodology.Build partnership with newly formed DMP organization and own engineering deliverables to shape and execute commodity projects. Promote culture of CI and automation to improve OTD and FPY. Define Digitalization strategy for various products considering competitor landscape working closely with Electrical Sector and Digital organization. Build culture of innovation through planned events, participating in brain storming. Identify opportunities for filling disclosures and execute division goals for IP. Work closely with product teams to drive product synergies. Collaborate closely with other Engineering Centers and other Engineering Teams to build Engineering footprint and contribute towards ""Simplify for Growth"" strategy for ES EMEA and APAC Region. Lead and develop capabilities for a team of 210+ engineers. Works closely with LSD, PDD, PQED & ICPD facilities in EMEA Region for New Product Developments, Cost out, sustaining and application engineering projects. What You’ll DoExecute and Manage as per the strategic direction provided by each of the business division. Align with product strategy. Provides leadership for the team to meet its short and long term goals.Provide leadership to innovate new differentiating products and services.. Lead innovation events to shape ideas from the team Lead strategic initiatives to improve the overall execution performance, reliability, cost and manufacturability. Provide leadership, coaching, and mentoring for ""GEIS"", “EMEA” and ""APAC"" Engineers and related COE team at EIIC to develop innovative electrical and mechanical designs for electrical Equipment and come up with digital solutionsDevelop and control the schedule and direct the work in order to effectively manage time. Monitor progress & achievements on projects. Provide regular reports on development & support activitiesManage and develop people: identify, attract and develop key engineering talent for the organization. Develop successors in the organization Recruit and retain a team of engineers and support staff to provide both local product development and engineering services to the global engineering needs. Train, develop & motivate subordinates to achieve their professional goals & review their accomplishments.NPI efficacy and predictable execution on programs - Design cycle time reduction, Analysis first approach Build Organization Capabilities - Hire and develop talents for EMEA and APAC Region business divisions.Develop depth of capabilities in product engineering in Electrical, Mechanical, firmware and software as well as adjacent technology areas from Centers of Excellence (for e.g Modelling and Simulation CoE). Enable synergies for growth: Use of common CoE platforms in product development to improve Time to Market, Enhance effectiveness for ESManages department budget and performance to forecastUtilizes DFSS concepts / tools such as PDSC, P-Diagram, DFMEA, Risk Management & DVPR for new product development &/or existing product improvementsTeach, Mentor and Coach DfX Green belt certifications for EIIC engineering community.QualificationsMinimum education for this position is a Bachelors in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics Engineering, preferred is a Masters degreeAt least 12+ years of leadership experience in a multinational engineering organization and a total of at least 15+ years in leading an interdisciplinary program and/or team.SkillsShould have sound knowledge in Electrical products for Power Distribution, Power Quality, Life Safety and Control Products.Strong background in DFSS with GB/BB certification Drive growth in respective team in terms of breadth and depth of capabilities in Electrical and mechanical design as well as adjacent technology areas in product engineering. Proven track record of demonstrating competencies to manage a large and diverse team.Strong leadership potential and be in a succession role.We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees.
