to lift rankings and conversions Technical SEO (hands-on or strongly partnered with engineering): Crawl/index control, templates, and site architecture improvements that move rankings JavaScript rendering and performance (Core Web Vitals) diagnostics and fixes with dev teams Schema/structured data strategy (e.g., Product, FAQ, HowTo, Breadcrumb, Organization) to improve SERP + AI readability AEO / GEO (AI Search Optimization): Create citation-ready pages: clear entities, definitions, comparisons, and evidence blocks; consistent product terminology across the site Implement/validate structured data and on-page modules that increase extraction (FAQs, steps, specs, pricing/plan tables where applicable) Measure AI visibility via tracked prompts/queries, citation mentions, and overlap with priority clusters—then iterate content and schema Interview expectation: bring one example of an AEO/SEO experiment or case study (problem → approach → results → learnings) Brand & product launch: Partner with Product Marketing on new product launches: positioning, naming/terminology, launch pages, and message consistency across web properties Build launch-ready content systems (landing page templates, comparison pages, FAQs, proof blocks) that support both brand trust and conversion Nice-to-have: experience running or collaborating on paid acquisition (search/social) and using insights to improve organic + AI visibility Leadership & operating model: Lead analysts and content partners with clear priorities, QA standards, and weekly reporting Run a monthly roadmap across content, technical SEO, and AEO/GEO initiatives with measurable outcomes Coach execution and ensure repeatable systems (briefs, templates, internal linking rules, dashboards)  Responsibilities: Own the SEO + AEO/GEO roadmap for SaaS acquisition across Google and AI answer engines Improve performance of existing ranking pages (top 10 → top 3 where strategic) and expand clusters to grow qualified pipeline Partner with engineering on technical SEO (crawl/index, templates, CWV, JS rendering, structured data) Build topical authority via digital PR/backlinks and partner content where it supports product growth Support new product launches with SEO/AEO-ready messaging and launch pages; align with Product Marketing on brand narrative and terminology Set measurement: dashboards for rankings, non-brand traffic, conversions, and AI citations; communicate insights to stakeholders Manage team execution, quality, and delivery cadence in an AI-first search environment  Qualifications: 7+ years in SEO for SaaS or product-led businesses; experience owning outcomes (traffic, pipeline, signups) Demonstrated wins improving already-ranking pages and expanding keyword clusters with clear measurement Hands-on with Google Search Console, GA4, and at least one major SEO suite (Ahrefs/SEMrush) plus crawler tools (e.g., Screaming Frog) Strong technical SEO fundamentals and ability to partner with developers to ship fixes Practical exposure to AEO/GEO with a repeatable approach to improving AI citations/mentions Nice-to-have experience with paid search / performance marketing collaboration (ads copy, landing page testing, incrementality) to accelerate launches People leadership: hiring/coaching, prioritization, and stakeholder communication

title: Senior Product Manager
description_excerpt: About Team:US Omni Tech at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, is focused on improving Walmart customer experience across both physical & digital and making Walmart the most exciting place to shop. With 4000+ brick and mortar stores and thousands of other suppliers fulfilling Walmart's online/in-store orders for over 1 billion customers - the challenge and complexity is pronounced! We work within the world’s largest retailer yet maintain a startup feel working in small agile teams to revolutionize t
_full_description: About Team:US Omni Tech at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, is focused on improving Walmart customer experience across both physical & digital and making Walmart the most exciting place to shop. With 4000+ brick and mortar stores and thousands of other suppliers fulfilling Walmart's online/in-store orders for over 1 billion customers - the challenge and complexity is pronounced! We work within the world’s largest retailer yet maintain a startup feel working in small agile teams to revolutionize the fulfilment landscape. As a leader in the supply chain group, you are accountable and responsible for number of critical products/platforms that help serve our customers in the most cost-effective manner in multiple geographies and businesses.What you'll do:Assist in defining product features and translating business needs into user stories and technical requirements.Partner with engineering and QA teams to plan sprints and ensure timely, high-quality delivery.Analyze data and feedback to prioritize feature enhancements and resolve issues.Work with internal stakeholders (e.g., logistics, inventory, store operations) to gather and clarify requirements.Support in developing product documentation, training materials, and internal communication plans.Drive product capabilities and roadmap with very minimal supervision and guidanceBe technically savvy to build and grow technical platforms and products as well as contribute to engineering conversations & priorities in a scrappy, ambiguous start-up environmentBe an advocate of metric/data-based decision making, Make impact on a global scale.Promotes and supports mission, values, and standards of ethics and integrity.What you'll bring:You come with 3+ years of product management experience.Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a cross-functional teamExperience with eCommerce or internet-based products is a plus.Excellent communication and stakeholder management.Uncompromising commitment to the customer.Excellent written and verbal communication skills with ability to champion product solutions throughout the organization.Advanced/ master’s degree in engineering or management is preferred.About Walmart Global TechImagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people-led and tech-empowered.We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.Flexible, hybrid workWalmart’s culture sets us apart, and we know being together helps us innovate, learn and grow great careers. This role is based in our [Bangalore/Chennai] office for daily work, with the flexibility for associates to manage their personal lives.BenefitsBeyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include a host of best-in-class benefits maternity and parental leave, PTO, health benefits, and much more.BelongingWe aim to create a culture where every associate feels valued for who they are, rooted in respect for the individual. Our goal is to foster a sense of belonging, to create opportunities for all our associates, customers and suppliers, and to be a Walmart for everyone.At Walmart, our vision is "everyone included." By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.Equal Opportunity EmployerWalmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusive of all people.Minimum Qualifications...Outlined below are the required minimum qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no minimum qualifications.Option 1: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or related area and 5 years’ experience in product management. Option 2: 7 years’ experience in product management or related area.Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or related area and 4 years’ experience as a product manager, ideally working on consumer-facing, large-scale, highly complex B2B/C productsMasters: Business AdministrationPrimary Location...Block- 1, Prestige Tech Pacific Park, Sy No. 38/1, Outer Ring Rd Kadubeesanahalli , India

title: Senior Product Manager
description_excerpt: About ArcserveArcserve provides exceptional solutions to protect the priceless digital assets of organizations in need of full scale, comprehensive data protection. Established in 1983, Arcserve is the world’s most experienced provider of business continuity solutions that safeguard every application and system, on every premises and every cloud. Organizations in over 150 countries around the world rely on Arcserve’s highly efficient, integrated technologies and expertise to eliminate the risk o
_full_description: About ArcserveArcserve provides exceptional solutions to protect the priceless digital assets of organizations in need of full scale, comprehensive data protection. Established in 1983, Arcserve is the world’s most experienced provider of business continuity solutions that safeguard every application and system, on every premises and every cloud. Organizations in over 150 countries around the world rely on Arcserve’s highly efficient, integrated technologies and expertise to eliminate the risk of data loss and extended downtime while reducing the cost and complexity of backing up and restoring data by up to 50 percentPosition OverviewArcserve is seeking an experienced Senior Product Manager to lead the strategy and delivery of data protection and cyber resilience solutions designed for the Managed Service Provider (MSP) market.This role requires a strong blend of domain expertise in backup, disaster recovery, and cyber resilience, deep understanding of MSP business models, and hands-on experience leveraging AI, automation, and emerging agentic systems to drive innovation.This is a remote role open to candidates in India.Key ResponsibilitiesDefine and execute product strategy and roadmap for MSP-focused data protection solutionsDesign capabilities that support multi-tenancy, automation, scalability, and efficient MSP operationsDrive innovation in backup, ransomware protection, anomaly detection, and disaster recovery orchestrationIdentify and deliver AI/automation opportunities, including predictive insights, workflow automation, and agent-driven operationsPartner with engineering and data teams to develop intelligent, automation-first featuresLeverage AI tools to accelerate product workflows (research, documentation, analysis, prototyping)Collaborate with cross-functional teams and engage directly with customers and MSP partnersOwn end-to-end product lifecycle, including metrics, prioritization, and Agile executionRequired Qualifications7+ years of product management experience in enterprise or B2B SaaSStrong expertise in data protection, backup & recovery, DR, or cyber resilienceProven experience building or managing products for the MSP marketExperience using AI tools to enhance PM productivity and workflowsExperience defining or contributing to AI/ML, automation, or agent-driven featuresSolid understanding of MSP operations (multi-tenancy, service delivery, SLAs)Experience with hybrid/cloud environments (AWS, Azure, on-prem)Strong communication and stakeholder management skillsPreferred QualificationsExperience with DRaaS/BaaS or SaaS data protection platformsFamiliarity with ransomware detection and cyber recovery workflowsBackground in infrastructure (virtualization, storage, networking)Experience with subscription or usage-based pricing models

title: Principal Product Manager
description_excerpt: About UsOur leading SaaS-based Global Employment Platform™ enables clients to expand into over 180 countries quickly and efficiently, without the complexities of establishing local entities. At G-P, we’re dedicated to breaking down barriers to global business and creating opportunities for everyone, everywhere.Our diverse, remote-first teams are essential to our success. We empower our Dream Team members with flexibility and resources, fostering an environment where innovation thrives and every
_full_description: About UsOur leading SaaS-based Global Employment Platform™ enables clients to expand into over 180 countries quickly and efficiently, without the complexities of establishing local entities. At G-P, we’re dedicated to breaking down barriers to global business and creating opportunities for everyone, everywhere.Our diverse, remote-first teams are essential to our success. We empower our Dream Team members with flexibility and resources, fostering an environment where innovation thrives and every contribution is valued and celebrated.The work you do here will positively impact lives around the world. We stand by our promise: Opportunity Made Possible. In addition to competitive compensation and benefits, we invite you to join us in expanding your skills and helping to reshape the future of work.At G-P, we assist organizations in building exceptional global teams in days, not months—streamlining the hiring, onboarding, and management process to unlock growth potential for all.G-P helps organizations build global teams in minutes, not months. As part of this mission, we’ve created an indispensable AI agent for HR leaders, G-P Gia™ .Gia is our AI-powered global HR agent that provides HR compliance guidance instantly. Built on over a decade of global employment and legal expertise and 100,000+ vetted articles, Gia analyzes and generates compliant documents and delivers the answers that HR leaders trust — reducing reliance on outside legal counsel and cutting compliance costs by up to 95%.About The PositionWe’re building GIA - the AI for General Counsel, in-house legal teams, and HR teams — helping them operate faster and smarter before problems escalate. GIA is structured like a Startup that demands extreme ownership and relentless speed and a bias for shipping over talking. If you need permission to act, this isn't for you.This is a co-founder-level PM role reporting into the Head of Product and Engineering: you own the product end-to-end, talk to customers daily, design solutions, write specs, and ship. No swim lanes, no waiting for permission.What You Will DoExtreme Product Ownership — discovery, design, specs, delivery, outcomesBuild the product-led sales engine — onboarding, activation, upgrade triggers, PQLs, viral loopsDrive integrations — CLMs, HRIS, doc management, email; define data models and API contracts with particular focus on permission models and ethical walls.Run product research — competitive analysis, user interviews, workflow mapping, market sizing; synthesize into clear product directionTalk to GCs, legal ops, and HR leaders constantly — build conviction from real workflows, not feature requestsShip fast — cut scope, measure what matters, kill what doesn’tWork across time zones — distributed team across US, India, Ireland, PolandMinimum RequirementsWhat we're looking for:Engineer background — you can read code and reason about systemsStrong product sense and design ability — problem to wireframe to shipped productProduct research chops — you run discovery, synthesize qualitative and quantitative inputs, and turn research into roadmap decisionsAgentic AI fluency — you use Cursor agents, Claude, and similar tools dailyProduct-led sales experience — you’ve built self-serve funnels, activation flows, and usage-based sales signalsExtreme ownership and speed — you default to action and own outcomesRelentless curiosity — contract law, Kubernetes, behavioral psychology, whatever it takesDesign taste and chops — You can wireframe and develop mid fidelity prototypes where required without a designerCore Data Analysis Skills — you can work with product usage data, compliance datasets, and qualitative research to generate insights. Process experience - you can translate real-world HR and legal processes into the product by encoding workflows and business logicPreferred QualificationsPast founder or co-founderLegal or HR domain experience, particularly GC or legal opsIntegration experience — PRDs covering auth, data mapping, error handling, sync strategiesHow We EvaluateCritique our product live — directness and taste over diplomacySolve a real problem we’re facing — on the spotWhiteboard an integration architectureShow us something you’ve built that you’re proud ofActual compensation for this position may vary and will depend on multiple factors such as relevant qualifications, experience, education, and geographic location. For Full-Time Regular Employees, this position is also eligible for additional compensation as follows:Sales Roles: This position is eligible for a commission structure in addition to base salary.Non-Sales Roles: This position is eligible for an annual bonus which is paid dependent on various factors, including and without limitation, individual and company performance in addition to base salary.BenefitsG-P values its employees and offers excellent benefits and perks including generous paid parental leave, flexible time off, spending accounts, medical insurance, dental insurance, vision insurance, sabbatical after 5 years and more.Individuals residing, or applying to work, in the United States: California or Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, please review the following additional information:G-P will consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records in accordance with the California Fair Chance Act, Los Angeles City Fair Chance Act Ordinance, Los Angeles County Fair Chance Act Ordinance, and San Francisco Fair Chance Act Ordinance. Los Angeles applicants can review additional information regarding the Los Angeles City Fair Chance Act here: Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, and Philadelphia applicants can review information pertaining to Philadelphia’s Fair Criminal Record Screening Standards Ordinance here: Fair Chance Poster. Any consideration of a candidate’s background check with arrest or conviction records will include an individualized assessment based on the factors required by applicable law, including the candidate’s specific record and the duties and requirements of the specific job.G-P. Global Made Possible.G-P is a proud Equal Opportunity Employer, and we are committed to building and maintaining a diverse, equitable and inclusive culture that celebrates authenticity. We prohibit discrimination and harassment against employees or applicants on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, age, sex or gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, and pregnancy-related conditions), gender identity or expression (including transgender status), sexual orientation, marital status, military service and veteran status, physical or mental disability, genetic information, or any other legally protected status.G-P also is committed to providing reasonable accommodations to individuals with disabilities. Individuals with disabilities are encouraged to apply for these positions. If you need an accommodation due to a disability during the interview process, please contact us at careers@g-p.com.

title: Principal Product Manager
department: Software Development, Human Resources Services, and Staffing and Recruiting
description_excerpt: HackerRank helps companies like NVIDIA, Amazon, and Microsoft hire and upskill the next generation of developers based on skills, not pedigree. Our platform is trusted by over 2,500 of the world’s most innovative companies to build strong engineering teams ready for what’s next.Software has entered an era where humans and AI build side by side. As this shift accelerates, the definition of strong technical talent is changing. We give companies better ways to identify and invest in next-generation
_full_description: HackerRank helps companies like NVIDIA, Amazon, and Microsoft hire and upskill the next generation of developers based on skills, not pedigree. Our platform is trusted by over 2,500 of the world’s most innovative companies to build strong engineering teams ready for what’s next.Software has entered an era where humans and AI build side by side. As this shift accelerates, the definition of strong technical talent is changing. We give companies better ways to identify and invest in next-generation skills.People at HackerRank care deeply about the impact of their work and sweat the small details so our customers can be wildly successful with products they genuinely love to use. We move with urgency and believe great outcomes come from high standardsAbout The RoleWe're looking for a Product Manager to drive the product strategy for Screen, HackerRank's core hiring platform. This is a high-impact role where you'll shape how companies evaluate technical talent at scale, working at the cutting edge of AI-powered assessment.You'll own the future of candidate evaluation—defining how we leverage AI to assess technical skills, problem-solving ability, and collaboration in ways that are both innovative and trustworthy. This is cutting-edge AI evaluation work that's defining new standards for the industry.The platform operates at significant scale and carries a meaningful technical legacy, serving customers of various sizes, shapes, and needs—from startups running a handful of interviews to enterprises processing thousands of assessments. This isn't about greenfield product work; it's about making sophisticated decisions in a constrained environment and delivering measurable impact.The role comes with high visibility across the organization, including direct exposure to our CEO, and requires close collaboration with platform teams working on integrity, IDE infrastructure, and AI capabilities.What You'll DoOwn the product strategy and roadmap for Screen, making critical decisions about how we evolve our core evaluation platform while balancing innovation with platform stabilityDrive AI-first evaluation capabilities, defining what signals matter, how AI can surface insights that human reviewers miss, and how to make evaluation both more effective and more fairNavigate technical complexity at scale, working deeply with a team of X engineers (including X staff engineers) and an Engineering Manager to balance technical constraints with user needsBalance competing needs across multiple personas—recruiters, hiring managers, and candidates—designing solutions that work across their often conflicting requirementsGuide customers through platform evolution, spending time understanding their hiring challenges, managing migrations to new experiences, and ensuring we solve real problemsCollaborate across teams and time zones, working with multiple product and platform teams, and often serving as the bridge between technical complexity and customer valueLead with visibility and impact, working directly with senior leadership and driving cross-functional initiatives that shape the future of technical hiringWho You AreYou've built B2B SaaS products at scale where you balanced competing needs across different user personas and made tradeoffs that worked for multiple stakeholdersYou're comfortable with complex, legacy systems and don't need every problem to be new or sexy—you can get excited about intricate technical challenges and the hard work of improving something that already exists at scaleYou understand the complexity of serving diverse customers—from small teams to large enterprises—and can design solutions that flex across this diversity rather than forcing one-size-fits-all approachesYou have strong judgment under pressure and can go deep technically when needed, build empathy across different personas, and synthesize complex constraints into clear decisionsYou care deeply about customers and see direct customer engagement not as a chore but as essential input for building the right thingEven better if you haveExperience working with legacy systems and driving incremental transformation in constrained environmentsBackground in assessment, evaluation, or EdTech productsExperience with AI/ML product development or integrating AI capabilities into existing platformsTrack record of managing complex platform migrations while maintaining customer satisfactionYou wil thrive in this role if youYou're energized by complexity, not overwhelmed by it. The challenge of navigating a legacy platform serving diverse customers excites you rather than frustrates you.You're comfortable working globally. This role requires collaboration across multiple time zones, including occasional meetings outside standard hours, and you see this as an opportunity rather than a burden.You want high visibility and impact. You're ready to work with senior leadership, including our CEO, and drive decisions that shape how companies around the world hire technical talent.You're passionate about the cutting edge of AI evaluation work. You want to be at the forefront of defining how AI changes candidate assessment and you're excited to push boundaries while maintaining trust and fairness.You balance deep technical engagement with customer empathy. You can dive into technical constraints with staff engineers one hour and guide a customer through a migration the next, finding energy in both.Want to learn more about HackerRank? Check out HackerRank.com to explore our products, solutions and resources, and dive into our story and mission here.HackerRank is a proud equal employment opportunity and affirmative action employer. We provide equal opportunity to everyone for employment based on individual performance and qualification. We never discriminate based on race, religion, national origin, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital, veteran, or disability status. All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.Linkedin | X | Blog | Instagram | Life@HackerRankNotice To Prospective HackerRank Job ApplicantsOur Recruiters use @hackerrank.com email addresses.We never ask for payment or credit check information to apply, interview, or work here.

title: Senior Product Manager
department: Data Security Software Products, Computer and Network Security, and Software Development
description_excerpt: Congratulations, you have taken the first step towards bagging a career-defining role. Join the team of superheroes that safeguard data wherever it goes.What should you know about us? Seclore protects and controls digital assets to help enterprises prevent data theft and achieve compliance. Permissions and access to digital assets can be granularly assigned and revoked, or dynamically set at the enterprise-level, including when shared with external parties. Asset discovery and automated policy e
_full_description: Congratulations, you have taken the first step towards bagging a career-defining role. Join the team of superheroes that safeguard data wherever it goes.What should you know about us? Seclore protects and controls digital assets to help enterprises prevent data theft and achieve compliance. Permissions and access to digital assets can be granularly assigned and revoked, or dynamically set at the enterprise-level, including when shared with external parties. Asset discovery and automated policy enforcement allow enterprises to adapt to changing security threats and regulatory requirements in real-time and at scale.Know more about us at www.seclore.comYou would love our tribe: If you are a risk-taker, innovator, and fearless problem solver who loves solving challenges of data security, thenthis is the place for you!A sneak peek into the role: We are fast growing product company and bringing next generation products in ‘secure your data’ domain. We are one of the few product companies in globe that can protect and control data wherever it travels. This is the opportunity to build an exciting and high impact product. Security is core to what we build, and we’re looking for a Product Manager who’s passionate about building secure, scalable, and user-centric products.Seclore seeks an experienced Product Manager with deep expertise in managing large-scale data, its architecture, and transforming it into actionable insights, along with strong technical expertise and client-facing skills.This role involves launching a new product, connecting clients, industry experts, and our technical team to define data-driven use cases and outcomes. Strong communication skills, solid understanding of data platforms and analytics, and efficient project management in complex, data-rich environments are essential.Here's what you will get to explore: Requirements Gathering & DefinitionCollaborate with security architects, engineers, and compliance teams to gather technical, data, and regulatory requirements, including how large-scale data is captured, stored, and protected.Translate complex cybersecurity and data architecture needs into clear product specifications, data contracts, and user stories that guide implementation.Understand end-user journeys and instrument product experiences to gather usage, performance, and security metrics, enabling evaluation of new features’ effectiveness and data-driven decision-making.Be the Functional ExpertUnderstand the full Seclore product suite functionally and be the expert for the product modules owned by you, including how they integrate with enterprise data platforms and pipelines.Know various user personas, their business context, and their data needs, such as reporting, analytics, and insight generation.Understand the technology environment, including devices, operating systems, browsers, and the underlying data architecture (data flows, storage, APIs, and integrations) that powers product capabilities.Product Development SupportPartner with engineering teams throughout the development lifecycle to ensure secure design and implementation of data flows and storage patterns at scale.Participate in sprint planning, backlog grooming, and daily stand-ups to provide product and data-related guidance, clarify instrumentation requirements, and prioritize insight-generating features.Security IntegrationEnsure security is embedded in all stages of the product lifecycle while balancing observability, logging, and analytics needs for large volumes of product data.Work on integrating security tools and frameworks (e.g., SIEM, IAM, DLP,into the product ecosystem and associated data pipelines, ensuring events are captured and modeled for actionable insights.Technical DocumentationCreate and maintain detailed documentation for security features, APIs, workflows, data models, and compliance mappings, including how product data is collected and used for analytics.Cross-Functional CollaborationAct as a liaison between product, engineering, security, data, and compliance teams to align on data strategy, metrics, and architecture decisions.Support Product leaders and GTM leaders with technical and data insights, feasibility assessments, and recommendations on how to leverage Seclore data for customer outcomes.Risk & Compliance AlignmentEnsure product features and data handling practices align with internal security policies and external regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS), including data retention and access controls.Assist in security audits and risk assessments by providing clear visibility into product data flows, architecture, and evidence from product usage analytics.We can see the next Entrepreneur at Seclore if you have: A technical degree (Engineering, MCA) and business degree (MBA) from a reputed institute.5+ years of experience in B2B product management, technical program management, or cybersecurity engineering.Experience working in Agile environments and collaborating closely with engineering teams.Ability to break down complex technical problems into simple, actionable steps.Strong analytical, communication, and organizational skills.Experience working in a software product organization as a product consultant, product owner, business analyst or functional expert in the product team.Proven experience working with large-scale data platforms, understanding data architecture, and using product data to derive actionable insights and drive decision-making.Technical background in software either from software development or systems perspective.GOOD TO HAVE: Awareness and exposure to User Experience design practices.Experience in information security procedures and practices.Initiative to take up responsibility and ownership of tasks and ensure end to end delivery and completion with the highest level of quality.Why do we call Seclorites Entrepreneurs not Employees? We value and support those who take the initiative and calculate risks.We have an attitude of a problem solver and an aptitude that is tech agnostic. You get to work with the smartest minds in the business.We are thriving not living. At Seclore, it is not just about work but about creating outstanding employee experiences. Our supportive and open culture enables our team to thrive.Excited to be the next Entrepreneur, apply today!Don’t have some of the above points in your resume at the moment? Don’t worry. We will help you build it.Let’s build the future of data security at Seclore together.

title: Senior Product Manager/Product Manager - Platform
description_excerpt: About WatiStarted as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.Our Platform & AI CapabilitiesWati is designed for scalability and intelligence.
_full_description: About WatiStarted as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.Our Platform & AI CapabilitiesWati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.Our Backing & Partnerships Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.About The RoleWati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.What you'll do:  Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadershipRequirementsExperience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem productsStrong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflowsTrack record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and dataAbility to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scaleData-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skillsNice to have:Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleupCoding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from dataFamiliarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystemBachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field

title: Senior Product Manager
description_excerpt: Come thrive at Tandems! At Tandems, we’re reimagining the future of financial advice. We empower financial advisors to deliver smarter, more human guidance by combining data, empathy, and artificial intelligence. Partnering with leading financial institutions, we deploy intelligent software and AI to enhance advisor productivity and deepen client relationships - enabling firms to deliver personalized advice at unprecedented scale.After building one of the industry’s leading Digital Wealth platfo
_full_description: Come thrive at Tandems! At Tandems, we’re reimagining the future of financial advice. We empower financial advisors to deliver smarter, more human guidance by combining data, empathy, and artificial intelligence. Partnering with leading financial institutions, we deploy intelligent software and AI to enhance advisor productivity and deepen client relationships - enabling firms to deliver personalized advice at unprecedented scale.After building one of the industry’s leading Digital Wealth platforms, we’ve evolved. Today, Tandems is an AI-first company, building intelligent tools that help advisors run better meetings, anticipate client needs, and make more informed decisions. Our solutions are trusted by some of the world’s largest and most innovative financial institutions, including Wells Fargo, New York Life, Scotiabank, and Citizens.About the Team and OpportunityAs a Senior Product Manager at Tandems, you will help lead Tandems’ next chapter by embedding AI thinking and capabilities across our suite of products and shaping how financial advisors work in the age of intelligence.This is a high-impact, cross-functional role at the heart of Tandems’ transformation. You’ll work closely with Engineering, Data Science, Design, Research, and Business stakeholders to define and deliver products that blend machine learning, behavioral insights, and human-centered design.You’ll drive innovation not only within a specific product area but also across the company, influencing how we conceptualize and integrate AI across our ecosystem, from advisor tools to client engagement and portfolio management experiences.Why Work for UsWe are 100+ employees strong and growing. Our world-class team is supported by an industry-savvy board and an executive team of diverse background and experience across financial services and technology.We offer competitive benefits that include Flexible PTO, Wellness benefits, Mobile/Internet subsidy, Employee Recognition Programs, and more!We are a remote-first company! We have regional hubs nationwide, with presence in 4 Countries: United States, Canada, India, and Singapore.We embrace a culture that honors and celebrates diversity of backgrounds, approaches, and experiences.We are guided by our core values: Customer Delight, Make It Happen, Think Big, and We Over Me. Read more about our core values and how we live them every day on our website here.How You’ll Make an ImpactShape the AI vision for advisor success: Lead the roadmap for products that use intelligence and automation to transform the financial advice industry.Infuse AI across Tandems’ ecosystem: Partner with other Product, Engineering, and Data Science leaders to define how AI enhances user experiences and outcomes across all existing and future products.Translate intelligence into action: Work with data scientists to turn model outputs into intuitive product experiences that create measurable real-world value.Champion responsible AI: Define and advocate for principles around transparency, fairness, and explainability in every product we build.Experiment and iterate: Use data and user feedback to drive hypotheses, run experiments, and evolve features that deliver measurable advisor and business impact.Collaborate broadly: Partner across design, marketing, and customer success to ensure product experiences are cohesive, valuable, and aligned with Tandems’ mission.Ideal Person for this Role5–10+ years in a product-focused role, ideally building and shipping enterprise, B2B, or platform products at scale.Systems thinker with the ability to understand how product decisions influence data flows, adjacent teams, and end-to-end user journeys.AI-curious and fluent, comfortable discussing models, ML-driven UX patterns, and data-powered product experiences (no coding required).Human-centered mindset grounded in empathy, user research, and designing technology that enhances—not replaces—human expertise.Strong analytical and research skills, leveraging both qualitative and quantitative insights to prioritize effectively and measure impact.Execution excellence, with a track record of balancing strategy and detail, making tradeoffs, and delivering in fast-moving environments.Technical curiosity, able to dive into data models, APIs, and system architecture to understand how intelligence becomes value.Data-driven and outcome-oriented, using metrics, experimentation, and evidence to drive decisions.Collaborative leadership, with extensive experience influencing and partnering across engineering, design, data, sales, marketing, and operations.Exceptional communication skills and the ability to work effectively with remote or distributed teams; FinTech or startup experience is a plus.Perks and BenefitsTax-friendly CompensationLiberal Leave PolicyMedical cover for the family, including parentsQuarterly Wellness BenefitMobile/Internet subsidy (for smooth WFH experience)Tandems is backed by premier venture capital firms, including Bain Capital Ventures, General Atlantic, Nyca Partners, and Union Square Ventures as well as leading financial institutions including Wells Fargo, UBS, Santander, New York Life, and Comerica. We've raised over $100 million to support our growth as a leading technology provider to financial institutions.© Nvest. All rights reserved, Tandems is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We encourage people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives to apply.San Francisco Applicants: Tandems will consider applicants with arrest and conviction records (criminal histories) in a manner consistent with the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance.

title: Senior Product Manager- Remote
description_excerpt: Who are are:Cimpress Technology develops cutting-edge, best-in-world software that our mass customization businesses use to create personalized products for millions of global customers. Our Mass Customization Platform (MCP) consists of modular, multi-tenant services. Our businesses include a dozen brands such as Vistaprint, National Pen and Box Up. These businesses can choose the solutions that work for them, or assemble any custom combination they need. This makes it easier and faster to do th
_full_description: Who are are:Cimpress Technology develops cutting-edge, best-in-world software that our mass customization businesses use to create personalized products for millions of global customers. Our Mass Customization Platform (MCP) consists of modular, multi-tenant services. Our businesses include a dozen brands such as Vistaprint, National Pen and Box Up. These businesses can choose the solutions that work for them, or assemble any custom combination they need. This makes it easier and faster to do things like introduce new products, reach customers and track orders. This kind of innovation keeps customers coming back. Just last year, Cimpress generated $3.2B in revenue through customized print products, signage, apparel, packaging and more.Our Team:The Access team plays a critical role in securing and enabling the Mass Customization Platform (MCP), the technology backbone that powers Cimpress businesses such as Vistaprint, National Pen, and others.Access is responsible for onboarding businesses, managing users, and safeguarding the platform through robust Identity, Authentication, Tenancy, Account Management, Authorization, and Risk Intelligence and Compliance solutions. Our systems ensure that every person, service, and application that intends and is permitted to connect with MCP can do so securely and operate with the right level of trust and control.As a Senior Product Manager in the Access team, you will own the product direction and execution for critical functional areas within our Identity and Access Management (IAM) and extended portfolio. You will serve as the bridge between high-level platform strategy and on-the-ground execution, delivering secure, scalable, and developer-centric solutions. You will take ownership of complex problem spaces such as identity, authentication, authorization, tenancy, and risk intelligence and drive them from vague requirements to successful global adoption. You will act as a trusted partner to engineering and security architects, and business teams making data-informed trade-offs between security rigor, compliance, and user experience. In this role, you will operate with a high degree of autonomy, and influence stakeholders across Cimpress businesses. You will ensure that our authentication and authorization services evolve to support emerging technologies, including AI agents and third-party ecosystem integrations.What You Will DoDefine and execute the quarterly and annual product roadmap for significant components of the Access products. Translate high-level strategic goals into detailed, actionable plans.Lead deep-dive discovery with Cimpress business units to identify unarticulated needs. Use data, market research, and competitive analysis to validate hypotheses and prioritize high-impact features.Lead continuous market research, competitive analysis, and engagement with partner teams and business units across the company to identify and prioritize high-impact opportunities, define business cases, and lead 'build vs. buy' evaluations for critical Access related product technologies.Collaborate with engineering to translate the large-scale initiatives into a clear, prioritized backlog of measurable outcomes.Comply with the UX principles of the Access products, ensuring our APIs, SDKs, and tools are intuitive, well-documented, and easy to integrate. Champion a secure, scalable, and API-first foundation for the products you manage.Collaborate across the organization with business units, platform teams, and stakeholders to ensure Access solutions meet real-world needs while balancing security, usability, and scalability.Collaborate with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions and negotiate technical tradeoffs.Measure and improve outcomes using adoption metrics, platform performance data, and customer feedback to continuously refine product features and operational processes.Manage expectations with stakeholders across Cimpress businesses, communicating progress, risks, and changes effectively.What Will Make You A Great Candidate9-14 years of professional experience, including 5+ years as a Product Manager, ideally working on complex, high-quality B2B or B2C web-based products, preferably in the SaaS space.Deep domain expertise and proven track record in Identity & Access Management (IAM), Authentication protocols (OAuth, OIDC, SAML), Granular Application Access Control, Security and Compliance, Role-based Access Management, Policy-based Access Management, or Platform tenancy.You prioritize understanding user and business needs and translate insights into intuitive, secure, and reliable product experiences for both internal and external users.Strong sense of UI/UX principles, development frameworks, functional design, and familiarity with tools and platforms used for product development. You have good tech grasp and are able to collaborate meaningfully with business users, engineers, architects, and security teams.Demonstrated ability to translate complex, ambiguous customer and business needs into clear product requirements and milestones.Leverage quantitative and qualitative insights to inform decisions, measure outcomes, and continuously improve product quality and usability.Exceptional skills in partnership, communication, presentation, and influencing across diverse teams and stakeholders. You can build consensus and drive decisions among the product cross functional team.Exceptional technical acumen and ability to collaborate meaningfully with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions.Proven track record of managing a portfolio of technical, API-first platform products through the full lifecycle, from ideation to deprecation.Some Nice To HavesBachelor’s degree in Computer/IT/Electronics Engineering and/or previous s/w development experience is a huge advantageMBA from a Tier-1/Tier-2 Business School.Deep working knowledge of one or more of the these areas: SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect, Social SignOn, SSO, LDAP, Okta, Auth0, integrating with API-first productsAbility to create concept wireframes.Exposure to Agentic AI productsWhat’s In It For You (besides the best in-class rewards):An Opportunity to be a part of the global market leader in the mass customization industry.A chance to GROW professionally building technology solutions for a largely unorganized market.A system that EMPOWERS each member with a high degree of trust, freedom and autonomy.A GLOBAL team that has some of the best minds in product, data and engineering.A REMOTE-FIRST operating model and impeccable culture.Why you will love working hereBeing at Cimpress means that you don’t see work as just a building, a desk or a manufacturing floor. You see it as a chance to take a step forward in your career journey – and your life. We strive to give you everything you need to learn, grow, and succeed. Through innovation, collaboration, and perpetual exposure to what’s next, we’re always pushing boundaries and broadening our horizons. We embrace the chance to operate outside of our comfort zone to discover what we’re capable of. Some might call that a challenge; we just call it another great day at work.We will help you define a clear perception of how to make the most of what you do best.Equal Opportunity Employer:Cimpress is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, national or ethnic origin, nationality, age, religion, citizenship, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender presentation, legal or preferred name, marital status, pregnancy, family structure, veteran status or any other basis protected by human rights laws or regulations. This list is not exhaustive and, in fact, in many cases, we strive to do more than the law requires.We're Remote-FirstIn 2020, Cimpress adopted a Remote-First operating model and culture. We heard from our team members that having the freedom, autonomy, and trust in each other to work from home and the ability to operate when they are most productive, empowers them to be their best.Please visit our company website to learn more about Cimpress and how we empower people to make an impression through mass customization by delivering uniquely personalized products in a convenient and affordable way. You'll find detailed insights into our entrepreneurial approach, global operations, and commitment to innovation at cimpress.com.

title: Senior Product Manager
description_excerpt: About Team:US Omni Tech at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, is focused on improving Walmart customer experience across both physical & digital and making Walmart the most exciting place to shop. With 4000+ brick and mortar stores and thousands of other suppliers fulfilling Walmart's online/in-store orders for over 1 billion customers - the challenge and complexity is pronounced! We work within the world’s largest retailer yet maintain a startup feel working in small agile teams to revolutionize t
_full_description: About Team:US Omni Tech at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, is focused on improving Walmart customer experience across both physical & digital and making Walmart the most exciting place to shop. With 4000+ brick and mortar stores and thousands of other suppliers fulfilling Walmart's online/in-store orders for over 1 billion customers - the challenge and complexity is pronounced! We work within the world’s largest retailer yet maintain a startup feel working in small agile teams to revolutionize the fulfilment landscape. As a leader in the supply chain group, you are accountable and responsible for number of critical products/platforms that help serve our customers in the most cost-effective manner in multiple geographies and businesses.What you'll do:Assist in defining product features and translating business needs into user stories and technical requirements.Partner with engineering and QA teams to plan sprints and ensure timely, high-quality delivery.Analyze data and feedback to prioritize feature enhancements and resolve issues.Work with internal stakeholders (e.g., logistics, inventory, store operations) to gather and clarify requirements.Support in developing product documentation, training materials, and internal communication plans.Drive product capabilities and roadmap with very minimal supervision and guidanceBe technically savvy to build and grow technical platforms and products as well as contribute to engineering conversations & priorities in a scrappy, ambiguous start-up environmentBe an advocate of metric/data-based decision making, Make impact on a global scale.Promotes and supports mission, values, and standards of ethics and integrity.What you'll bring:You come with 5+ years of product management experience.Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a cross-functional teamExperience with eCommerce or internet-based products is a plus.Excellent communication and stakeholder management.Uncompromising commitment to the customer.Excellent written and verbal communication skills with ability to champion product solutions throughout the organization.Advanced/ master’s degree in engineering or management is preferred.About Walmart Global TechImagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people-led and tech-empowered.We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.Walmart’s culture sets us apart, and we know being together helps us innovate, learn and grow great careers. This role is based in our Bangalore office for daily work, with the flexibility for associates to manage their personal lives.BenefitsBeyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include a host of best-in-class benefits maternity and parental leave, PTO, health benefits, and much more.BelongingWe aim to create a culture where every associate feels valued for who they are, rooted in respect for the individual. Our goal is to foster a sense of belonging, to create opportunities for all our associates, customers and suppliers, and to be a Walmart for everyone.At Walmart, our vision is "everyone included." By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.Equal Opportunity EmployerWalmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusiveMinimum Qualifications...Outlined below are the required minimum qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no minimum qualifications.Option 1: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or related area and 5 years’ experience in product management. Option 2: 7 years’ experience in product management or related area.Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or related area and 4 years’ experience as a product manager, ideally working on consumer-facing, large-scale, highly complex B2B/C productsMasters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business AdministrationPrimary Location...Block- 1, Prestige Tech Pacific Park, Sy No. 38/1, Outer Ring Rd Kadubeesanahalli , India

_full_description: About Pocket EntertainmentPocket Entertainment is a global leader in immersive audio storytelling, creating richly produced narrative experiences that engage millions of listeners across the world.With over 100 billion minutes streamed annually, an average of 120 minutes of daily listening time, and more than 6 billion total audio plays, Pocket FM is on a mission to build the world’s largest AI-powered audio streaming platform, powered by a thriving community of 250,000+ creators. The platform continues to see rapid growth in the US and India, with strong expansion momentum across Europe and LATAM.Our mission is to redefine the future of storytelling by empowering writers and creators worldwide with next-generation AI tools, from story generation co-pilots and seamless multilingual adaptations to expressive voice synthesis and creative tooling for image and video generation. As an AI-first company, we’re building and deploying proprietary generative AI models that power our entire value chain, spanning content creation, curation, marketing, distribution, and monetization.What you’ll own?Own and drive the strategy and roadmap for creators experience & retention on the platform for your charterPartner cross-functionally with engineering, design, data, business & analytics to ship high-quality, impactful product featuresUse data and user insights to inform prioritization and continuously iterate on product experiencesEffectively communicate complex ideas, fostering alignment among leadership and cross-functional teamsCollaborate with various product teams to develop solutions to shared challenges across multiple product linesEnsure the pod delivers measurable impact on creator retention, user growth and revenue for the companyWhat we’re looking for?5+ years of product management experience, ideally in B2C. Previous experience in working on creator facing products is a plusProficient in analytical thinking and problem-solving, skilled at converting data insights intoGrowth mindset with a passion for experimentation, A/B testing, user empathy and rapid iterationProficient in analytical thinking and problem-solving, skilled at converting data insights into practical strategiesDeep passion for designing and delivering exceptionally pleasing user experiencesExcellent cross-functional leadership: Engineering, Business, Design, and GTM teamsDeep passion for entertainment, storytelling, content creation, or the creator economy

title: Senior Product Manager/Product Manager - Platform
description_excerpt: About WatiStarted as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.Our Platform & AI CapabilitiesWati is designed for scalability and intelligence.
_full_description: About WatiStarted as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.Our Platform & AI CapabilitiesWati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.Our Backing & Partnerships Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.About The RoleWati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.What you'll do:  Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadershipRequirementsExperience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem productsStrong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflowsTrack record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and dataAbility to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scaleData-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skillsNice to have:Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleupCoding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from dataFamiliarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystemBachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field

title: Senior Product Manager - AI Platform
description_excerpt: About the RoleWe are looking for a Senior Product Manager for our AI Platform to drive the execution and delivery of Aurigo's proprietary AI foundation model, agent framework, and the AI platform layer that powers our products. This is a hands-on product role that operates at the intersection of AI engineering, enterprise software, and capital program workflows. You will partner closely with engineering, data science, and design teams to define, build, and ship AI capabilities that are safe, mea
_full_description: About the RoleWe are looking for a Senior Product Manager for our AI Platform to drive the execution and delivery of Aurigo's proprietary AI foundation model, agent framework, and the AI platform layer that powers our products. This is a hands-on product role that operates at the intersection of AI engineering, enterprise software, and capital program workflows. You will partner closely with engineering, data science, and design teams to define, build, and ship AI capabilities that are safe, measurable, and impactful in enterprise environments. Unlike the Director role which is focused on strategy, vision, and stakeholder leadership, this role is about deep execution. You will own specific product areas end to end, write detailed requirements, drive sprint-level delivery, and ensure that AI products meet well-defined quality and safety standards before reaching customers. You will also engage with customers and internal product teams to ground your decisions in real-world use cases.Roles and ResponsibilitiesOwn and execute the product roadmap for assigned areas of the AI platform, including the ingestion and context layer, orchestration layer, agent framework components, and the Copilot experience across all product lines.Write detailed product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for AI features, and drive sprint planning, backlog grooming, and delivery tracking in close partnership with engineering and machine learning teams.Define and maintain the evaluation framework for assigned AI features including offline evals, benchmark metrics, regression tests, and production monitoring. No agent or model capability ships without defined success criteria.Own the responsible AI execution process at the feature level, including guardrail testing, safety checklists, bias review, and auditability verification before any AI capability reaches customers.Serve as the internal AI platform expert for Senior Product Managers across all product lines, providing guidance on how to correctly integrate, specify, and evaluate AI capabilities within their respective workflows.Contribute to the model management and MCP server roadmap by gathering data on provider performance, cost, and quality, and by identifying integration opportunities and validating tool specifications.Engage with enterprise customers to gather feedback on AI feature performance, understand adoption patterns, and translate insights into roadmap decisions.Monitor the competitive landscape for relevant AI product developments, agent frameworks, and enterprise AI tooling, and bring insights into prioritization discussions.Soft SkillsTechnically credible with engineering and data science teams. Can engage substantively on prompt design, evaluation tradeoffs, RAG configurations, and agent behavior without needing to write code.Clear and precise communicator. Able to write requirements, specs, and documentation that engineering teams can act on without repeated clarification.Customer empathy. Listens carefully to enterprise customer feedback and translates nuanced qualitative input into actionable product decisions.High ownership mindset. Takes accountability for feature quality, safety, and customer outcomes, not just delivery of scope.Structured problem-solver. Breaks ambiguous AI product challenges into well-defined hypotheses, experiments, and evaluation plans.Stays current with fast-moving developments in foundation models, agentic architectures, and enterprise AI deployment patterns.Hard SkillsStrong understanding of the AI product development lifecycle including data pipelines, prompt engineering, RAG architectures, fine-tuning, and agentic system design.Experience designing and running AI evaluation frameworks including offline evals, human evaluation pipelines, and production monitoring for AI features.Familiarity with responsible AI principles including human-in-the-loop design, fairness considerations, auditability, and guardrail implementation in enterprise settings.Working knowledge of model context protocol or equivalent tool-use and integration frameworks for agentic systems.Ability to define and track AI-specific product metrics including task completion rates, hallucination rates, model latency, cost per inference, and user satisfaction signals.Technical SkillsFamiliarity with major foundation model providers and the practical tradeoffs among them in terms of capability, cost, latency, context window, and data privacy.Working knowledge of vector databases, semantic search, and embedding-based retrieval systems relevant to RAG product design.Familiarity with AI evaluation tooling such as LLM eval libraries, RAGAS, or equivalent frameworks for measuring AI system performance.Understanding of AI orchestration patterns including ReAct loops, multi-agent coordination, and durable workflow execution for long-running agent tasks.Proficiency with standard product management tools alongside AI-specific development and observability platforms.Educational QualificationsBachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical field. Advanced degree in a relevant discipline is an advantage.Prior Experience7 to 10 years of experience in product management, with at least 2 to 3 years owning AI or machine learning product features in a B2B SaaS or enterprise software environment.Demonstrated experience shipping AI features to production in enterprise contexts, including agents, copilots, predictive models, or recommendation systems.Hands-on experience defining evaluation criteria and running evals for AI features, including benchmark design, human evaluation coordination, and production quality tracking.Experience working directly with data science and machine learning engineering teams on model prototyping, prompt iteration, or deployment workflows.Background in infrastructure, construction, capital program management, or other complex enterprise domains is a strong advantage.About AurigoAurigo provides AI-native platforms that help capital owners connect planning, construction, and operations in a single environment, improving decision-making and execution. Trusted by over 300 organizations across federal, state, and local government, manufacturing, data centers, energy and utilities, and life sciences, we manage more than $450 billion in capital programs across 40,000+ projects in North America. Built on 20+ years of domain expertise, Aurigo has received multiple industry awards and has been certified as a Great Place to Work for three consecutive years.At Aurigo, we go beyond building technology—we shape the future. If you're excited to join a fast-growing company and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry to solve real-world challenges, let's connect.

_full_description: Principal Product Manager - MediaSabre’s media technology platform powers the marketing campaigns that travel suppliers purchase across Sabre’s proprietary channels. With our industry‑leading Air, Lodging, Ground, and Sea businesses, along with a strong partner ecosystem, we see a significant opportunity to scale the media business over the next two years and expand our channel reach.The Media Product team works closely with customers, commercial teams, technology partners, and internal product and engineering teams.
